title: 3 Monkeys
synopsis: Movie about Anand, Santosh, and Phani are three happy go lucky bachelors who are not at all serious about their lives. The twist in the tale arises when they get into a massive problem. Things become even worse when this problem leads them into a murder case.

title: 3BHK Movie 2020
synopsis: For every individual,HOME plays a vital role in their LIFE as home has a strength to hold lots of emotions, relations, confusions, fun and memories.Our story runs in a 3BHK flat around three main characters namely Balu, Hasini and Krishna.
In Hyderabad city, a courageous inspector Rudra is given a case of mysterious deaths near ATM. On his hunt he finds out the truth behind these deaths are much complicated.

title: 47 Days: The Mystery Unfolds
synopsis: Satya, a Suspended Cop, who lost his wife in mysterious circumstances, unexpectedly gets hold of a case which relates to his wife's death. He's starts investigating which eventually hunts down his past and brings chaos in his life. How Satya solved the mystery surrounding him forms the rest of the story.
70/100 is a story about the couple who is in a long distance relationship. Distance could make us forget everything
A seductress prostitute lures her clients into a specific room which is numbered as 302. What she does with them once they are inside remains a mystery.

title: Adhunikam
synopsis: Its a story that shows how these generation illegal affairs effects the mindset of kids and how far these people can go for it.

title: The Admission Letter
synopsis: The movie is about the conversation over an admission letter between a conservative father and his film making enthusiast son. What are the concerns of the father? Does son persuade his father?

title: Agaadham
synopsis: The story is set in 1980s in rural Andhra Pradesh, when a farmer - Narsingi aged 50 gets remarried to a much younger girl Lachi, while already having a son - Babu, who is almost the same age as Lachi. It is their relationship that evolves beyond convention.

title: Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo
synopsis: After growing up enduring criticism from his father, a young man finds his world shaken upon learning he was switched at birth with a millionaire's son.

title: All Is Well with Suma
synopsis: Sending bright smiles and positive vibes your way, All is well is a talk show hosted by Suma Kanakala, where she interacts with various celebrities and maintains an entertaining tenor while highlighting all the good news from around the world.

title: Amaram Akhilam Prema
synopsis: A mistake by Akhila tears her apart from her father, who loves her the most. On a journey to win her father back, she meets Amar, a carefree guy who realizes what true love is.

title: Amrutha Ramam
synopsis: Amrutha Ramam is a heartfelt love story based on a series of true experiences. The film depicts the lives of Amrutha and Ram, and how together they find the meaning of selfless love.

title: Anaganaga O Athidhi
synopsis: Mallika(Payal Rajput) is a small-town girl who is going through a financial crisis along with her family. This is also the time she comes to know that her fortunes are going to change through an astrologer. As time passes, a person named Sreenivas(Chaitanya Krishna) visits their home and changes things around. Then starts a game of lust, cheat, and cruelness. Who is this Srinivas? Why did he come there? and what changes happen in Mallika's life? That forms the rest of the story.

title: Antharatma
synopsis: A mockumentary between a person and his inner soul

title: Anukunnadi Okkati Ayyindhi Okati
synopsis: Four childhood friends travel to Goa for a fun-filled wedding of their friend but their trip turns into a nightmare when they become involved in the murder of a stripper.

title: Asalu Em Jarigindhante
synopsis: Vaasu and Saavi had been in deep love since childhood. They had an accident right before they got married. He lost his memory and not aware of what happened to Saavi. After this, Vaasu 's parents sent him to his brother place who lives in Vizag. Saavi lived in Vizag, too, which Vaasu did not know it. Twist and Turn Saavi got engaged to Vivek. Whenever Saavi sees Vaasu, she's behaving differently from there she keeps remembering Vaasu always. Vivek watches Saavi with Vaasu and inquires what is happening?? She gives a reply that she cannot understand what is happening with her. Vivek plans to kill Vaasu but in his every plan fails every time as their is some power around him which keeps saving Vaasu . The rest of story is what power saves Vaasu from Vivek and What was the twist.

title: Aswathama
synopsis: After his sister and some other women are found mysteriously impregnated, a young man sets out to find the perpetrator.

title: Atma Rama Ananda Ramana
synopsis: A tale of success, happiness and dreams. Arjun Kalyan is an employee. He gets a promotion in the office and a son is born on the same day. While Arjun is traveling to his hometown, his boss asks him to do him a favor and on the way he asks his friend to drop him in the car. Arjun agrees to that, and later they talk for life with the person who came in contact with that car journey.

title: Balakot: The True Story
synopsis: Film on Balakot air strikes 2019.

title: Benchi
synopsis: Renuka, 10 years old is a Dalit girl from a small town. who is extremely mischievous and naughty. On the first day of their 5th standard classes, a Bench arrives into their school. This bench belongs to the village Zamindars son (RAVI), a 10 year old timid boy. Ravi alone sits on the bench while all the other kids are made to sit on the floor. RENUKA does not like this and she too craves for a bench of her own. She is forbidden to go near the bench, this all the more increases her craving for a bench. The story revolves around how RENUKA develops a friendship with Ravi and how her desire to sit on the bench drives her actions. What would happen if a Dalit girl wants to sit on a Bench that is owned by the Zamindars son is what the story deals with. What are the obstacles and consequences she faces for sitting on the bench is what the story entails.

title: Betting Poradu
synopsis: An expert in betting gets in a trouble and how he gets out of the trouble while dealing with his immature girlfriend.

title: Bhanumathi & Ramakrishna
synopsis: It is a story of 2 IT employees and their ups and downs in their relationship.

title: Bheeshma
synopsis: Tired of being single, a smart-aleck meme creator has a chance to prove himself to the girl he loves when he is suddenly appointed CEO of her workplace.

title: Black Rose

synopsis: A mystery of a murder that never happened.

title: Blue Eyes

title: Butta Bomma
synopsis: Pushapa while she was on dream her feelings sounds where heard by her maid, She tries to see the person but he went on bike.

title: Chevi Lo Puvv (Flower in the EAR)
Choosi Choodangane

synopsis: A tragic-comedy that is set in the 90s between two different personalities coming from different backgrounds that change their lives in a tale of love.

title: Coronavirus

synopsis: This is a story between 6 boys and one girl. The entire story will happen in one night. This story is Based on true events.

title: Desire

They established a new kingdom called Vijayanagara, hid the war loot in Kishkindha mountain and protected it by dividing the secret in two. Swamy then extracts a vow from forest tribe leader and Vijayanagara Minister to guard this secret.

title: Dirty Hari
synopsis: Hari is a man torn between his wife Vasudha and Jasmine. In his greed to lust after both, will he end up losing everything?

title: Disco Raja
synopsis: Vasu's huge family orphans and his girlfriend Nabha are asked to give up on hoping for his return, when he goes missing. A group of scientists working for Relive Biolab, want to pioneer in reviving dead bodies. They find a frozen body in Ladakh and the boss, Dr Sharma decides to turn it into his lab rat. Then there's the gangster Burma Sethu who suffers from PTSD and his arch-rival Disco Raja. A hired killer, hot on Vasu's heels, is sent by an unknown man. All these story-lines are interwoven in the movie.

title: Dubsmash
synopsis: Dubsmash is a movie revolving around the lives of college students, their trials with love and the problems they face due to social media. Throwing light on the issue of phone addiction, it is an all-out entertainer.

title: Ee Rathri Ki Evaru
synopsis: It's the story about how an intellectual police officer investigates the mysterious death of Rini who is found dead after samyuktha's prank call.

title: Erra Cheera
synopsis: This story narrates violation of the human rights,and it is focussed on the other side of the system how a common woman will Be treated by the system.

title: Eureka

title: The Farmer: Enter 2020 -22 Limca Book of Records
director: Siva Naga Rao Pamarthi, Padamata RaamGopalVarma

title: Girl
synopsis: An innocent girl becomes victim of morphing after she receives her morphed photos on WhatsApp from her best friend. The girl reaches out to the boy's father who is Ex Policeman. What happened after will unveil over the length of the story.

title: God Father
synopsis: Dangerous Gangster Marudhu singam(Lal) comes to hunt down a whole family. Adhiyaman (Natty )and his wife Mithra (Ananya) and their son Arjun (Ashwanth) fights back to save their life.Nail biting intense action Drama .

title: Gowripuram

synopsis: In a rural village, young girls are disappearing, a quirky police duo is on the hunt for the culprits. Meanwhile, a mad-man is creating ruckus in the village.

title: HIT
synopsis: An officer of the 'Homicide Intervention Team' who frequently suffers from having his panic attacks does everything in his power to rescue a woman who went missing.

title: Hulchul
synopsis: Trouble starts when the protagonist's friend hands him a Hulchul bottle of liquor with harsh after-effects and a wallet. The game starts when he loses the wallet and gets into trouble with the bad guys.

title: I Have A Cinema

title: IIT Krishnamurthy
synopsis: Krishnamurthy Who Is An IIT BOMBAY Student Comes To Hyderabad And Gets To Know That His Uncle Is Missing. Entire Story Revolves Around The Mysterious Missing Case Of Krishnamurthy's Uncle.

title: Irandam Kuththu
synopsis: Two friends embark on a trip to Bangkok with their wives, Things take a precarious turn when a ghost demands awkward returns from the men.

title: Isha
synopsis: The ghost of Isha, who was murdered by a few powerful men, possesses the body of a girl in a family that moves to a hill station bungalow. Isha is out there to take vengeance.

title: It's Time to Party
synopsis: A cyber-crime thriller whose story revolves around four characters.

title: Jaanu
synopsis: Decades post-high school, Ram and Jaanu meet at their school's reunion and explore their past thoughts consisting of affection, care, depth and grieve all over the period of one evening.

title: Johaar
synopsis: A gripping tale around the lives of five people grappling for their dreams when a young politician, suddenly in the hot seat of power, makes the life-altering decision of setting his father's legacy to stone by hook or by crook.

title: Kooch's It's Not Me
synopsis: Stuck at his home during the COVID-19 lock down, in India, Kooch, an independent filmmaker takes us through his routine in a conversation with a person who records it all on a mobile phone-recorded from sun rise of one day to sun rise of the next day. Though Kooch asks the person recording these to share their thoughts on the lock down, too...the person never utters a word. Kooch gets into an emotional roller coaster throughout, doing a retrospection of his life while also differentiating the changes around in the environment and how people struggle, change and adapt to live in the times of lock down and in the past. Owing to these situations, Kooch insists the person recording all this story to speak at last-to our surprise, would the other person speak? And, who is this person at last? The film ends with revelations and inspirations that inspired to make this film during COVID-19 pandemic. "It's Not Me" draws an inspiration from "This Is Not a Film" by Jafar Panahi, an Iranian screenwriter-director-editor.

title: Krishna and His Leela
synopsis: Torn between his past and present girlfriends, a confused bachelor's indecisiveness spins a web of lies and cheating as he struggles to commit.

title: Krupa Naalo

title: Madha
synopsis: MADHA is a Sanskrit term which means "insanity personified". MADHA is a female-centered psychological thriller that revolves around a small-time proofreader Nisha.

title: Maguva
synopsis: About a software Techie(Janani) and A Brutal Rapist gang who tried to Assassinate Janani And later how Janani escaped from that gang with her intelligence by throwing the strongest and emotional weapon called Love.

title: Uma Maheswara Ugra Roopasya
synopsis: After getting beaten up and insulted by the town bully, a softhearted simpleton Mahesh vows to be barefoot until he gets his revenge.

title: Maravairi
synopsis: Maravairi accentuates queer pride and celebrates Diversity and Inclusiveness. We embrace the bold legacy of LGBTQ while attempting a conceptual divergence from usual portrayal of Indian Classical Music.

title: Meenakshi
synopsis: A girl rents a house during the pandemic and encounters weird experiences in the house. Her boyfriend surprises her at midnight. A series of mysterious incidents follow after which the girl is found dead by her boyfriend the next day. Is the house haunted? Why did the girl die unfolds at the end of the movie?

title: Meka Suri
synopsis: The story revolves around Meka Suri, a butcher, who gets married to his love, Rani. However, when Rani gets brutally murdered by a group of people, Meka Suri decides to avenge her death with the help of Naxalites.

title: Meka Suri 2
synopsis: The story starts with a time lapse of 20 years. Suri is now a most-wanted criminal. Top cop Arjun is assigned the case to trace Suri and put him behind the bars. But the only information Arjun has of Suri is that he was shot dead years ago. Arjun does not even know how Suri looks now or where he is. He goes to Raghuram in search of clues but in vain. He gets to know the entire revenge story and also the reason why Suri became a criminal. After great efforts, Arjun is able to track Suri. He tries to trap Suri through a sting operation but it backfires. Suri is too smart for Arjun and throws him an open challenge by giving him names of the people he is going to kill. He challenges Arjun to stop him if he can. In spite of Arjun's perfect planning, Suri outsmarts Arjun again. But finally Arjun finds a loophole of Suri. He finds out that Suri had killed an innocent man unknowingly. And that man's 15-year-old son wants to take revenge from Suri. Arjun makes him realise that the path of killings has never taken anyone to the right path, It always ends badly. Suri realises and surrenders .

synopsis: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. He faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

title: Miss India

title: Money Addicted
synopsis: This story is inspired by true event, In India .

title: MurdeR
synopsis: A man from the lower caste saying his name poorna murders a random person in the street. After this incident, it will circulate all over the media and city will be in alert. At this time, poorna wants to give an interview to a news channel to say the reason behind the murder.

title: Murder
synopsis: After his beloved daughter elopes with an unworthy person, an emotional father chooses the hard path to make the corrections.

title: Naa Devudu

title: Naa Peru Raja
synopsis: Raaj and Jessie , A newly married happy couple settled in a Private luxury house, Encounter unnatural and unbelievable situations followed by series of trouble emotionally, physically and mentally .The protagonist Raaj challenges the situations and gets his share of Revenge .

title: Naan Sirithaal
synopsis: Gandhi is an IT guy who suffers from Pseudobulbar, and he uncontrollably laughs during stressful moments. He is taken to a Shiva temple and tied with a holy ornament, which is very strong, but it would bring a threat to him if separated.

title: Naatu Kodi
synopsis: The most corrupted police officer takes U-turn to save his father's last wish.

title: Nagayya Vimukti
synopsis: The Zamindar of the village gets to know that the people in the village are getting educated; and he is angered by it. Nagayya is a mild-mannered worker at Zamindar's home. Zamindar threatens Nagayya that he will get his son killed if he won't stop sending him to those "schools". Nagayya, torn between his son's wish to study and the threat to his family, needs the right motivation to revolt.

title: Naked Nanga Nagnam
synopsis: Story of a married couple in whose house a servant boy works. The couple are constantly fighting and on the verge of a break-up and then one day something happens which puts all 3 of them through a dizzying tension.

As the police remain clueless about the murder, they suspect the maid, her husband and the neighbor with whom he had trivial issues and some other characters. Who killed the man and what's the motive for the murder forms the rest of the story.

title: Nani, naa Boyfriend
synopsis: Nani is a jobless guy who is living on his parents and friends money. His girlfriend Vinny challenges him to buy a birthday gift to her with his hard earned money to prove his worth. Was he able to do it?

title: Narthanasala

As per the rule, in the 13th year, the Pandavas and their wife Draupadi have to assume different identities and live incognito until the upcoming Vijayadashami. In case their real identity is unveiled, they have to repeat their 12-year exile again.

title: Neelakanta Bar
synopsis: A heartbroken lover, a real estate salesman, and a police - all meet on one fateful night in Neelakanta Bar to confess their woes and revel in stories. Unknowingly they are part of each other's story and one far bigger than themselves.

title: Neetho Jathai
synopsis: Nani and Honey are in love but they didn't express to each other. They go on with their silly fights. A moment comes where they start to realize that the other one also feels the same. How they ended up makes up the rest of the story.

title: Neevalle Nenunna
synopsis: How the life of an innocent villager, Surya, changes when he mistakenly knocks the door of Avani who was about to end her life.

title: Newly Married
synopsis: An average looking husband and a beautiful wife get into a unique conflict and it turns into an erotic war.

title: Nikshiptam: Hidden

title: Nirbandham

title: Nishabdham

title: Nuv vanta chesavante - Sahasamane Cheppali
synopsis: See How seven friends helped each other in making one dish at home during the Pandemic. A fun Ride with a social message.

title: Oh Madhu

He starts narrating how he met his girlfriend Madhu. Madhu is a modern woman, who is hesitant at first, but later on observing Sri's sincerity, she falls in love with him. Sri always prioritizes films before everything. How did they end up makes up the rest.

title: Oka Chinna Prema Katha
synopsis: Akash is a small town happy go lucky guy who helps his father with his business who owns a printing press in the local town.the film showcases the journey of akash from childhood to grown up adult where he is trying to propose multiple girls with no luck.akash along with his best mate peter happens to attend a Christian wedding where akash falls for bridegroom(twinkle).twinkle on the other hand is very happy on her wedding day, she is getting married to the boy she had a crush(sam) since her childhood.it is at that point when church father asks sam to accept twinkle as bride sam confesses that he is in love with some other girl and he cannot marry twinkle and leaves the church.now that twinkle is heart broken akash sees the same pain in twinkle of what he has gone through all the way and wanted to console her at the same time admiring her.akash tries to speak with twinkle at couple of occasions but twinkle is in a sorrow state and reluctant to speak with akash.it is only after couple of funny incidents both akash and twinkle become friends, during their meets twinkle always tells akash about her love towards sam since childhood. As the story proceeds further at one point of time twinkle starts to devolop feelings for akash but very sceptical to confess the same to akash.it is right when akash calls twinkle that he wants to tell her something important and twinkle wants to take the same opportunity to propose akash.while twinkle is expecting akash at her home sam arrives at her door step and apologises her for what he has done and tells her that he has been cheated by a girl and says that now he understood the feelings of twinkle and guilty about his behaviour towards twinkle.it is right when twinkle about to say to sam about her feelings for akash,akash comes to twinkle home and says that twinkle should be marrying sam since she was in love with him since childhood.the rest of the drama revolves around twinkle sam and akash and how akash wins the heart of twinkle at the end.

title: Oka Chinna Viramam
synopsis: Deepak is a businessman immensely in love with his pregnant wife Sameera . But when his idea of raising profits for his business puts her in trouble, he teams up with Balu (Naveen Neni) and Maya to save her.

title: Oka Telugu Prema Katha
synopsis: Nachiketha meets rigveda in an accident and falls in love. Rigveda,who doesnt believe in love, wants to escape from this nuisance and also teach him a lesson at the same time, So she tells nachiketha that she will love him back if he can speak in pure telugu with everyone for the next 15 days.Will he be able to pass this test?

title: Once Upon a Time in Tollywood Vol. 1: Flop Director
Oollalla Oollalla
synopsis: Pandu (Nataraj) is an aspiring film director who studies engineering. Noorin (Noorin Shereef) is from the same college and falls in love with him for no reason. When Pandu gets lost in a forest and reaches a haunted mansion, how Trisha (Ankeeta Maharana) seduces him is what it's all about.

title: Orey Bujjigaa

Co-accidentally they both were traveling on the same train and in the same compartment.

title: Penguin

He meets a series of characters that represent people like his star mega brother, ex AP CM, a journalist and finally, the surprise is the entry of Ram Gopal Varma himself who speaks to Prawan Kalyan and tells him what went wrong and what kind of a fan actually he is of him. How all this is showcased is the rest of the story.

title: Prema Pipasi
synopsis: A man goes down a destructive path in his pursuit of true love to the extent of harassing the very woman that he claims to love.

title: Pressure Cooker

title: Raahu

title: Raavan

title: Raju Gari Kidnap

title: Rallalo Neeru
synopsis: Neela cannot explain her past actions easily, but her blackmailer has his own demands. Her marriage gets into trouble, but there are bigger questions about love and identity.

title: Run

title: Aapahasyam
synopsis: 'Aapahasyam' is a journey through and into the suppressed desires of love and inhuman acts that rises from it. Gandhi travels, run by Democracy travel agency departs from Bangalore for Kerala and its travellers represent the members of an audience it tries to communicate with. The journey happens over a night where it becomes a partial analysis of a schizophrenic society which evolved through different times, with its eyesight diminished to binary views under a systemic frustration of patriarchy. Here bus becomes the frame of a system and its perpetrators and victims, the travellers. In its ambition, the film is two fold. One as the subject and one as its critique. The confined space of this bus, welcomes and critiques the mainstream audience who would watch and celebrate the events in it.

title: Abhi's Kshana Kshanam
synopsis: The story of a man who smokes all day but one day every thing changes due to his habbits

title: Ac 1995

title: Aham

title: Aham Bhramhasmi
synopsis: Job loss, stocks plummeting, business closing, and just when life seems to be bleak, a glimmer of hope enters into your life in the form of a game, ArYa, where for each level you complete you get a certain amount deposited into your account. Higher the level, bigger the amount deposited. And just when you think it's a boon it turns out into a bane and a fox trap. And this game becomes the flash news and the talk of the town in the two Telugu speaking states. Parallelly, unrelated to the game, a group of 5 friends who quit their regular 9 to 5 desk jobs, start a detective team/ private investigation team, through which they come across many varieties of cases. The team members varied persona, characteristics and unique talents helped them to maintain a 100 percent solvency record and turned them into professionals in their field. As the cases progressed, they understood that most of the cases they came across were due to the newly surfaced online game ArYa. And slowly they understand that the players cannot leave the game until they complete the 26th level, and also cannot tell anyone about the game as they may lose their money, not only the ones they earned through the game but also his/her life earnings and also their family's, and if a player decides to back out they cannot do so, as their loved ones life would be in danger, this basically makes the game a labyrinth. At first the team were disinterested in the game, until one of their members died because of the game. Motivated by the death of their friend, the team is now hellbent to bring down the game and in the process they come to know that their friend committed suicide only to unravel the mystery of the game. As they unearth more about this game and its maker, a very shrewd and a notorious executor, they are shocked with the things they learn about the game. What are those details? Will the team be successful to bring down the game and its maker? What is the 26th level that makes it so difficult for the players? What if all this is just a cover up or a distraction for something much bigger than this?

She works as a daily wage laborer in a quarry, as a worker at a flour mill, and starts supporting the family. The family gets into deep financial stress as the head of the family doesn't provide for them. She still manages to pull the family together with her earnings.

The quest is also to find who Vasudha is, and what her story is, something that has been kept a secret. Aditya begins his journey to find the truth and Vasudha. Aditya follows the rabbit hole in the heartfelt journey of Vasudha. Whether he is successful in this ordeal or not, determines the fate of this love story.

synopsis: Nandini is a brilliant and dashing TV Channel reporter with a motif of becoming top name in television news media. She is in love with Sanjay, a software Engineer, lives with her father. A girl named Sudha is working in Hospital as a Nurse is very close to Nandini and her father. Sudha does not have the parents except one younger brother Shiva, who is studying computer Engineering. One day Sudha is gang raped and murdered. Nandini and Shiva got upset with this incident and Nandini carries story in her channel. ACP Prathap who is in charge of Sudha's rape case with all protest from public, who arrests the three rapists and they were sentenced for life time imprisonment by court. Among three rapists one fellow tells a truth behind that happened in Sudha's rape case. He reveals that the real rapists of sudha are the three guys belongs to big and influential people's family. Nandini tries to bring out the real rapists who are all protected by the police department. She collects all the evidences against that three boys. The political, police and media nexus tries to sabotage Nandini who is running behind the truth. Her lover Sanjay and Shiva joins her to fulfill her mission. What happens to Nandini who is targeted by all bad elements makes the climax interesting, gripping narrative. Click a crime and suspense firm has mind blowing actions with songs and entertainment elements.

The film features a large and ethnically varied cast, most of who were facing a camera for the first time ever.

The rest of the story is how Varun along with his girlfriend and family save the girls from getting trafficked forms the crux

synopsis: Njattyela Sreedharan, a fourth standard drop-out, compiles a dictionary connecting four major Dravidian languages. Travelling across four states and doing extensive research, he spent twenty five years making the multilingual dictionary. This unique dictionary offers a comparative study of Malayalam, Kannada, Tamil and Telugu. 'Dreaming of Words' traces Sreedharan's life, work, love for languages and the struggles to get the dictionary published. The film also explores the linguistic and cultural diversity in India.

title: Eakam
synopsis: Eakam a philosophical fiction thinly based on the life of Shiva. This type of genre is never been attempted in Telugu. It's has been shot at a record span directed by a debutant B Varun Vamsi under the banner Ananda Thoughts production company and A Kalyan Sastry's Samskruthi Productions. Though there were certain limitations we roped in a young team and shot in various different locations in and around Hyderabad. The undercurrent of the film is a spat on the current stereotypical society. It's a new age drama which follows the five elements of nature viz. Earth fire wind water and sky. The 5 main characters represent each element n how the story unfolds by the jobless god talking about oneness of human souls is the crux of the film.

title: Ee Kathalo Paathralu Kalpitam

The movie continues with Vishika narrating her story and what all changes happened in their life with this so-called 'emotion.'

This upsets Das and a huge argument erupts between the couple. It finally ends in a very emotional and startling revelation. Why is Chandra speaking like that and what is the whole freedom at midnight thing all about. That forms the story.

Darkness approaches at the end of the journey for the abducted souls. The story revolves around the aforesaid journey. The country secured freedom at midnight, but today's freedom can be attained only at the eve of the voting day. Will the people be able to acquire the freedom they seek?
language: Hindi, Malayalam, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Bangla

When, her company's HR sta'rts to engage in sexual harassment, she approaches Chotu for help. He solves her problem, and the two fall in love soon after. One day, Madhu decides to surprise Chotu with tickets to "The Ghost Resort". lt's a specially horror themed resort designed to thrill visitors. Even the way they hand out tickets and welcome their guests in horrifying. The whole place is designed similar to a cemetery setup. The staff are all dressed in demonic attires. The customers and the staff have a jolly.time scaring each other. Along with Chotu and Madhu, there are the lovers, Balu and Swapna, the movie technicians, Satish, Vinod and Maggi, the family of Gopal, Supriya and their 3 children, and the old couple Vishwanathan and Sujathamma, making a total of 5 groups as customers to the resort.

title: Lawyer Viswanath
synopsis: Viswanath is a lawyer who is blessed with a loving family which is supported by his wife Kamala and his loving 8-year-old daughter Akshara. He is a man of values and lives with principles. Viswanath spends considerable time with his family to ensure he gives proper love and affection. His world is small, but it is filled with joy and peace. On his daughter's birthday he takes his family for an evening outing and returns back with a load of smile cherishing the well spent evening. On the way back a tragedy strikes Viswanath and his family which is un-imaginable for a person like him. A person like Viswanath who believes love and affection is the path to happiness is shattered. At this juncture he is left with few options in his hand. 1. Consider it as a bad dream and forget it 2. Stand for his rights as a common man 3. Use his legal frame work to seek justice 4. Turn into an avenger What is this tragedy? In what way is his family affected? Will such tragedy have an impact on the society? Viswanath as a lawyer who never wanted to take up criminal cases, set asides his values to ensure society lives with values. He doesn't approach his tragedy to seek justice for what has happened to him. He surprises the entire legal system with an approach that is entirely different from normal cases. What did Viswanath do? What happened to his wife and his daughter? Is Viswanath risking his life? What is the final verdict from court? Be ready for a powerful court scene film which will bring you to the edge of the seat.

Two of the four family members acted while the other two became the crew. Suitcases with wheels became track and trolley, selfie stick became Gimbal, emergency lights were used for lighting, music stand is used as camera stand and remote control toys, play dough were used smartly to get desired effects.

title: Mr & Miss
synopsis: Shashi works as a HR in a company and has been looking for a transfer to Hyderabad and finally, she gets transferred. She reaches Hyderabad happily, thinking that she can live with her boyfriend happily. After reaching Hyderabad, she sees her boyfriend in a compromising situation with another girl and gets hurt. Her boyfriend talks in such a way that her ego gets hurt. She goes to a pub from there and kisses Shiva who was sitting alone and leaves from there. Shiva gets into a state of shock. Shiva is a BTech graduate from Amalapuram. Upon his father 's pressure he tries to get a job by paying money through backdoor. But, he gets cheated there. Shashi comes as a HR for the same company. Shashi gets impressed by the innocence of Shiva and says that she can give the job if he learns English in 15 days. From then, friendship blossoms between them while Shiva learns English with the help of Shashi. Soon, their friendship turns to love. And they get into live in relationship and lives happily. After sometime, Shiva gets expelled from the office because of his fake certificates. From then on, he stays at home and takes good care of Shashi. Slowly, he gets used to live idle without any job and life goals and drinks a lot and doesn't take good care of Shashi. Shashi gets frustrated with this kind of behaviour and says break up to him and while leaving, she says that she has deleted all his memories and asks him to delete all her memories from his phone in front of her. Then Shiva realises that his phone is missing. When he calls his number, they cut the call and switches it off. They are very afraid as they have their romantic video in that phone. At the same, time they hear a news stating that a similar video is leaked in Bangalore. They are more afraid. They both go to each and every place he visited the day before. Unable to find the phone, they give a police complaint and even searches in second hand phone market also. At one stage, she even suspects on Shiva also. At last, she gets really frightened and she thinks of committing suicide. Shiva consoles her by saying that they both have to fight it together. But, she decides to fight alone and leaves the house. Later, they memorise all their beautiful moments and feels very emotional and they meet up again. When they meet, they come to know that a neighbourhood boy took his phone to play. They both forgive each other and thinks not to repeat the same kind of mistakes again and enters the house.

synopsis: Nayanam is an urban suspense thriller. Sunayana who is a rich affluent classy woman running a business empire loses her sister who allegedly committed suicide. Now she has two serious jobs finding the truth about her sister Nayana's death and saving herself from a mysterious assailant. Being the prime suspect her husband Harsha runs away in suspicious circumstances. Now she has to rely on two persons who crossed into her life - A professional health caretaker referred by her family doctor to safeguard her at home during her blindness and a career ambitious cop to bust the suspicious serial deaths. Will both of them succeed in saving her from danger? How could she save herself blindfolded, when both of the supposed saviors are helpless due to unexpected events at a crucial time is the core of the film. Produced by LAOS Motion Pictures, Written and Directed by Kranthi Kumar Vadlamudi this urban classic thriller is coming soon in theaters. - Nayanam is an urban suspense thriller. title: Red
synopsis: Siddharth is an IIT graduated civil engineer running a successful building firm, while his lookalike, Aditya, is a gambling thief who deceives people along with his sidekick, Vema. Siddharth is in love with Mahima, while Gayathri loves Aditya, unaware of his real identity. One day, Aditya tries to help Vema pay his debt by extracting money from Gayathri through lies, but she helps him in spite of knowing the truth. After taking the money, Aditya is enraged, and so is Siddharth after a party. That night, one of them breaks into a house and attacks the owner, Akash, stabbing him to death. The next day, Aditya frees Vema by paying his debt and wins Gayathri's trust by returning her money and telling her the truth. As the investigation of Akash's murder proceeds, a selfie clicked by a couple nearby is found with either Siddharth or Aditya in it. Both of them are brought in and interrogated without knowledge of the other's presence. CI Nagendra, who shares an old rivalry with Siddharth, tortures him. Siddharth's alibi is that his car broke down, and as his car doesn't have the repair kit, he called a taxi driver to help him. Sub-inspector Yamini handles Aditya, who on the other hand, cites various laws to escape torture. She reaches out to Akash's friend and shows him the photograph of Siddharth/Aditya, but he refuses to recognize him. She also questions Vema and orders him not to leave the city without permission, but he secretly escapes. Yamini then learns of the rivalry between Siddharth and Nagendra; Siddharth helped Nagendra's daughter elope with her lover against her father's wishes. The forensic expert informs Yamini about a hair sample recovered from the crime scene and how it doesn't match anyone else in Akash's home. At the police station, Siddharth tries to escape but is interrupted by Aditya. The two violently fight, hurting everyone and vandalizing the station in the process. Aditya and Siddharth are revealed to be identical twins after their DNA is found to be the same, and both confess their pasts: The twins parted ways in their childhood when their parents divorced. Aditya lived with his mother, who developed a gambling addiction to cope with her grief and anger over her difficult family and marital life, but wouldn't refuse anyone who asked for help. One day, Aditya's mother promised to give up gambling, but instead committed suicide. Aditya was then taken in by his father, who showed no love to him. As a result, he ended up developing the gambling addiction. One day, his father spotted him gambling and took him by force, when got into a fight with him and Siddarth. The twins then spent one year in a mental development institution due to anger-management issues. Later, Aditya became interested in studying law but eventually left school due to his lack of college ethics. The duo separated once their dad died. Recently, when Aditya came home one day and left in front of Siddharth, his ring for Mahima went missing. Siddharth reported his brother to the police, who beat him up. Aditya himself told Siddharth where the ring was, causing Siddharth to realize his mistake. Aditya had actually come home for a photo of their mother, and vowed to seek revenge. Nagendra still wants to frame Siddharth for Akash's murder, but the taxi driver who helped Siddharth confirms he was really stuck on the night of the murder. It is also proved that Aditya paid Vema's debt with gambling money he won after playing all night. The court acquits both Aditya and Siddharth in order to protect the innocent one from punishment. Nagendra voluntarily retires without getting his revenge. A disappointed Yamini later calls Akash's friend to inquire about a girl he was infatuated with, and is shocked to learn it was Mahima. Siddharth is finally revealed to have murdered Akash for drugging, kidnapping and raping Mahima to death out of a childhood lust. Akash had also bribed the police to avoid charges. When Aditya found out about the murder, he helped Siddharth by getting arrested as well to throw off the police. Later, Aditya meets with Siddharth and explains how Yamini can't reopen the case since she created a fake witness to help Siddharth and could get herself arrested, having been suspended once for doing this. Siddharth gives Aditya a photograph of them with their mother and says he is going to Mumbai, and later to Copenhagen, never to return. Having sold all of his property in India, Siddharth gives a 50% share to Aditya as a tribute. After his marriage to Gayathri, Aditya realizes his lack of trust in his mother, coupled with her family's, prompted her to kill herself. He promises to do better with his wife. Seven months later, some of the investigating officers agree to appear in a documentary about the murder. One of the officers calls the case unprecedented, before a filmmaker tells him that similar cases occurred in other countries as well.

Engulfed by love and bravery, an Indian National Army personnel finds himself caught between a dangerous rebellion and the coloniser's grip.

title: 1996 Dharmapuri
synopsis: Hanumantha Rao, the Sarpanch of Dharmapuri, has a foster kid named Suri, who falls for a girl Malli. Her mother disapproves of him and asks Laxmi Rajyam Patel, his father's political opponent to intervene. Will the sarpanch go by the rules or will he help the lovebirds?

title: 2020 Golmaal
director: Basu Chakraborty, John Jakki, Ravi Khanna, Hrishikesh Mukherjee, RDBurman
synopsis: A village guy named Raghu fell in love with a girl. His friend aspired for a relationship with a senile But here, a twist has been happened. An MLA, along with Raghu and his family members have found missing abruptly.

title: @buddhistandqueer: Their Journey from Sarees to Robes
synopsis: Tashi, a young queer activist in India, renounces wearing sarees to take on Buddhist robes. Flagging both their queer gender and their faith, they pushes on the fight for LGBTQI+ rights in the turbulent oceans of current Indian politics.

title: @Love
synopsis: It's a unique love story. Screenplay is excellent, cinematography is amazing and locations are very beautiful. Artists are almost new but their performance is peaks especially lead characters Malaxmi and Chandra superb.

title: Aa Ammayi Gurinchi Meeku Cheppali
synopsis: Naveen believes that the audience are brainless sheep who deserve to be fed low-quality fodder. While preparing for his next feature, Naveen stumbles upon some footage from a long-abandoned film. Can he convince Alekhya to act in his film?

title: Aadavaallu Meeku Johaarlu
synopsis: Chiranjeevi grows up in the company of his mom and aunts who dote on him. But he is ultimately frustrated at not finding a bride who would be approved by all of them.

title: Aadhaaram
synopsis: An action crime thriller with romance. Feel stunning experience and feel good entertainer for families and all genres.

title: Aasha Encounter
synopsis: Disha gang assault and killing on 27 November 2019 shocked the entire country when 4 young guys in a Lorry targeted a Scooty driving young veterinary doctor and brutalized her crossing the upper limits in the crime history of India

title: Acharya
synopsis: Touted to be a socio-political actioner, the plot revolves around a middle-aged Naxalite-turned-social reformer who launches a fight against the Endowments Department over misappropriation of temple funds and donations.

title: Alipiriki Allantha Dooram Lo
synopsis: A small-time idol frame seller, hitches a robbery for quick money and this swirls into a big-time money hunt changing his life and others life forever and it's a divine decision which exemplifies the fact "what goes around comes around".

title: Alluri
synopsis: Follows a sincere police officer and his journey through various phases of his life.

title: Am Aha
synopsis: Kalyan and his friends are prime suspects in a murder case and are asked to pay 20 lakhs as bribe by the corrupted CI. They only have 24 hours to clear their names. Will it work out?

title: Ameena
synopsis: An adolescent love story that deals with social strife finally reacts with an ultimatum towards society.

title: Amma Ammayi
synopsis: Ravi son of Ramulu village president since 14 years his father proposal to participate election, Ravi refuse and went to Hyderabad there he fell in love with Pooja. His friend Sandeep drug addiction person working under Nagaraju after some days Ravi knows he cheated by friend and lover finally he come back to village became president because of his Amma Ammayi.

title: Ammu
synopsis: A woman takes desperate measures in an attempt to get her abusive husband suspended from police duty.

title: Andaru Bagundali Andulo Nenu Undali
synopsis: Srinivas Rao and his wife Sunitha are both hearing and speech impaired. After spending two nights in the hospital where his daughter was admitted, Srinivas Rao travels back home on a Hyderabad Metro Train but falls asleep. Another passenger. Sameer, finds this amusing and decides to post a picture of Srinivas Rao Online, labelling him a drunkard. The rest of the movie explores the troubles Srinivas Rao and his family face when he is recognized by people as the "Hyderabad Metro Drunkard", as well as how Sameer deals with the consequences of his own actions.

title: Ante Sundharaniki
synopsis: A Hindu Brahmin falls for a Christian girl and they both lie to their parents, only for their lies to be revealed.

title: Anukoni Prayanam
synopsis: Anukoni Prayanam, directed by Venkatesh Pediredla, featuring Rajendra Prasad and Narasimha Raju in the lead, tries to capture the ups and downs in life - looking at it from different perspectives.

title: Ap04ramapuram
synopsis: A series of suicides in a village leaves the village panchayat shocked and worried. Are these suicides or planned murders? Will the police be able to solve this mystery?

title: Ashoka Vanamlo Arjuna Kalyanam
synopsis: Arjun, a 34-year-old Bachelor, who is constantly pestered by society about him being unmarried. Does he get married? How does he overcome the pesters in the life?

title: Athadu Ame Priyudu
synopsis: Veerendranath has enchanted generations of readers with his unrivaled Telugu novels about love, friendship, and betrayal. This story is an attempt by him to show what false notions and false levity of young generations are, and also what love itself is magical and elegant. When We are on the verge of the end of the universe, a person who believes in love without reservation, a woman who believes in romance, and her boyfriend all happen to meet at the same time, what happens? These are the circumstances, emotions, and inclinations that lead to the consequences. In general, Athadu Ame Priyudu is black-humored. Despite the light and humorous dialogue, there is a lot of depth and meaning beneath it all. Yandamuri Veerendranath successfully directed Sunil, Banerji, Kaushik, Maheswari, and Bhushan in their roles.

title: Atithi Devobhava
synopsis: Abhi(Aadi Sai Kumar) suffers from a problem called Mono Phobia. Because of this, he cannot survive alone and always expects someone to be on his side. In this process, he falls in love with Vaishnavi(Suveksha). When everything seems to be going fine, Abhi's phobia creates new issues in his love story. How does a person with such delicate issues handle his love story? That forms the rest of the story.

title: Balamevvadu
synopsis: Once Upon A Time In Vizag, there are two lovers, whose story is like a love boat ride in the sea, but suddenly they were hit by the " Medical Mafia" like a cyclone. Are they gonna drown or survive this storm? Experience this intense-emotional-revenge drama, blessed with magical music of Manisharma, amazing actors, impactful screenplay and dialogues.

title: Balraju
synopsis: A simple-minded cowherd, Balraju is mocked by the villagers who take advantage of his innocence. His loving grandmother worries for him but finds a girl Anjamma and gets them married. And just when things are looking up, Anjamma leaves Balraju.

title: Bangarraju
synopsis: Bangarraju and Satyabhama come down to settle the life of their grandson Chinna Bangarraju and to save the treasure of temple.

title: Bari
synopsis: Cockfights are a hobby for a young man in village. One day he finds a gamecock. One day all of a sudden that gamecock will be missed.

title: Behind Someone
synopsis: Ashish, is an a inteatual police officer the killer has been chopped the victims breast .. but there no evidence to catch the killer.As of now we have seen lot of types of killers. like physco killer. spree killer rampage killer serial killer but now we are introducing a intense passionate killer.

title: BFH (Boyfriend for Hire)
synopsis: Arjun chooses the 'Boyfriend for Hire' profession and girls go crazy to hire him. He's hired by a lovely girl, Divya, who mesmerizes him. Does Arjun solve her problem? Or will she become a threat to his profession?

title: Bhala Chora Bhala
synopsis: Raj and his friends who get entangled in a mess involving criminal activities. How Raj and his friends manage to get away from the mess that they have created?

title: Bhala Thandanana
synopsis: Shashirekha works as an investigative journalist for a leading media company. While at an orphanage, she is introduced to Chandrasekhar who is covering the news. On the other hand, a series of murders take place.

title: BhamaKalapam
synopsis: Anupama is a meddlesome mom, pushy wife, and a nosy neighbour, who begins to suspect that the neighbour killed his wife. Anupama tries to escape, but things go wrong.

title: Bheemla Nayak
synopsis: Things change when the egos of an upright police officer and a retired army havildar clash.

title: Bimbisara
synopsis: Bimbisara is a ruthless emperor of Trigarala in 500 BC. In unexpected circumstances, Bimbisara travels in time and reaches the current day not knowing that a power-thirsty doctor Subramanya Sastry and Kethu are already waiting for him to come. Bimbisara has to deal with modern day hustle and bustle.

title: Black
synopsis: Aditya is a Police Constable who's life takes a turn when a murder and robbery that take place while he is on duty. Can Aditya manage it all?

title: Bloody Mary
synopsis: Three best friends Mary, Raju and Basha come close to making their dreams come true. In an unexpected turn of events, the three of them have evidence to a murder and make enemies with some vicious people. Will Mary be able to escape her enemies while keeping her best friends safe?

title: Bomma Blockbuster
synopsis: Pothuraju is a fisherman, film freak & ardent fan of Director Puri Jagannath. His life ambition is to conjure up the dramatic moments in his life & persuade his idol Puri Jagannath to make a film based on him. As time passes, he discovers life-altering secrets about his own family and life. Thus, Pothuraju will get forced to confront the deep pain behind his ludicrous antics and a simplistic worldview. To know what are those life-altering secrets & did he achieve his life ambition, watch 'Bomma Blockbuster' movie.

title: Bommala Koluvu
synopsis: To find what happened to his fiancé Raaga, Rudra must unearth Raaga's neighbor's dark secrets.

title: Bujji Ila Raa
synopsis: Brutal kidnappings and murders of 8-year-old girls poses a tough challenge for the Warangal Police Department. After the investigating officer meets with an accident, Muhammad Khayyum is appointed. Can he solve the murders?

title: Butterfly
synopsis: A kidnap of two children occurs and to find their whereabouts ,several inter cuts of Operation Butterfly takes place.

title: Cheppalani Undhi
synopsis: A tragedy that relays a unique story about a Telugu boy who loses what he loves the most: his mother tongue, Telugu. His path then takes on a hilarious yet thought-provoking journey where science and belief come together to save him

title: Chittam Maharani
synopsis: Chaitra needs to return to her hometown as PM has announced national lockdown. Raju, a bike mechanic and her friend, agrees to take her. Meanwhile a little girl is kidnapped. Will Chaitra reach home safely? Is the little girl safe? What is Raju hiding from Chaitra?

title: Chor Bazaar
synopsis: Bachchan Saab (Akash Puri) steals tires and other petty material and is in love with a mute girl Simran (Gehena) of the same area - Chor Bazaar, which is infamous for stolen material. A stolen diamond from Hyderabad's museum lands in the hands of a person in Bachchan Saab's gang. Police, thieves, and gangsters are after this valuable diamond.

title: Clap
synopsis: A former amputee athlete picks up a girl from a village to train for national championship event.

title: Clouds of August
synopsis: Nidhi,a dental student pursuing her junior year reminisces various episodes in her life that happened while she was a freshman.

title: Clue
director: Ramesh Rana, Balachandra, Ramu, Mendam Sreedhar
synopsis: Haragopal an officer of Archeology Dept is hounded by persistent dreams of his previous birth that relate to a kingdom and the hidden treasure. Will he succeed in finding the treasure forms part of the socio-fantasy thriller movie. Raja Ravindra, Madhu Nambiar, Sayaji Shinde, Devgill, Jeeva, Pruthvi Shekar, Sabina Jasmin, Sanjana Naidu and Shubangi Pant play important roles in the movie.

title: Crazy Fellow
synopsis: Abhiram makes a profile on a dating app in hopes of meeting a girl, he falls for a complete stranger without even meeting her. Small misunderstandings and quirks of fate snowball his love story into something more than what he predicted.

title: Daari
synopsis: What if one problem is encountered by five different people who have no connection between them and leaves them with only three options. What path will they take? How will they survive?

title: Darja
synopsis: Kanchu Kanakam is a brand ambassador for all the Vaivaka crimes happening in Vaivaka. ACP Paidipati Siva Sankar tries to spoil Kanakam's plans and also investigates Ganesh's murder.

title: Day Dreamers - Every Success Starts a New Journey
Day Dreamers - Every Success Starts a New Journey of a Man
Degala Babji
synopsis: Babji is a murder suspect who also is an emotionally unstable man. He describes the modes operandi behind the crime he committed that eventually helps the cops disclose unfolded facts.

title: Deyyamtho Sahajeevanam
synopsis: Its a revenge drama of a girl Naina, on social media. And victims who try to take them on, get killed without a trace or a clue for police to find out.

title: Dhagad Saamba
synopsis: Dhagad Samba go to Hyderabad and become the tenant of a house. Samba and PK fall in love with their owner's daughters. When everything goes well, Samba gets to know a shocking truth. To know everything, you need to watch the main film

title: Dhamaka
synopsis: Swamy and Anand Chakravarthy are lookalikes. Swamy is a jobless guy, while Anand is the son of Nanda Gopal Chakravarthy, running a company called People Mart. Under dicey circumstances Pranavi, a pretty young girl falls in love with both of them. When JP, a monstrous corporate honcho seeks to acquire People Mart through unethical means, Anand and Swamy's lives get intertwined.

title: Dhrukkonam
synopsis: A point of view between two guys on good and evil. The situation arises when one of the three guys going somewhere in the car has a gun and a situation that made him have that gun. Changes the story to a new turn.

title: Director
synopsis: A film director meets with an accident and his life takes a major turn. What happened before and after the accident and what he is seeing which no one can see.

title: DJ Tillu
synopsis: A lazy young man spends his time chasing girls, until an incident changes his life forever.

title: Dongalunnaru Jagratta
synopsis: Raju, a petty thief, decides to rob an expensive SUV and soon realizes that the car is an inescapable trap. Here starts Raju's excruciating race against time to survive inside the SUV where an enemy from outside has complete control of the car. What does the enemy want? Is Raju a deliberate target? Will Raju be able to survive?

title: Dorakuna Ituvanti Seva
synopsis: Arjun is a Crime Branch Police Officer who handles extra-marital affair cases. Arjun considers the profession as divine until he catches his wife Navya with her boyfriend Sandy in his house. What will Arjun do?

title: Dr. 56
synopsis: The story is based on some real events happening in the society. This is a science fiction medical thriller murder mystery story . PRIYA, who is a CBI officer, comes to the City for investigation of a murder mystery case. The hero, Arjun, is suffering from some strange disease? how this mystery is solved by these two people is the entire story

title: Dream Boy
synopsis: A boy with high ambitions writes scripts for movies. With the support of his friends he tries to fulfill his dream of getting a diamond necklace from a dead body's coat in the tomb. Will he be successful?

title: Driver Jamuna
synopsis: A taxi driver unwillingly became accomplice to goons

title: F3: Fun and Frustration
synopsis: Venky and Varun Yadav are ordinary guys with ordinary lives. Their struggle is all about money. One day they hear about a wealthy industrialist in Vijayanagaram who is looking for his heir. What happens when Venky, Varun and the gang arrive at his doorsteps pretending to be his heir.

title: First Day First Show
synopsis: Seenu, a 18 year old student who is known as a crazy Pawan Kalyan Fan. His crush Laya asks him to get her the tickets for the movie Kushi first day first show, and promises to watch the show with him. Will he get the tickets?

title: Flight Maayam
synopsis: scientific research and adventure movie, A young man graduated ,he would like achieve his hole, that is a mystery it is a real event harped between space and earth in 1955 one flight is takeoff from earth.

title: Focus
synopsis: Bhanuchander, a cop gets murdered at a guest house. The investigating officer Vijay Shanker takes up the case and suspects it to be a possible homicide. Will Vijay and Bhanuchander's wife (Suhasini) be able to track the criminals?

title: For a slice of Pizza
synopsis: Shekar, an investigative journalist wants to eat his final pizza before he gets killed.

title: Friend Zone
synopsis: Siddhu proposes his feelings to his girlfriend Geetha and she puts him in friend zone.

title: Gaalodu
synopsis: Raju, a reckless guy from a village, escapes to Hyderabad after a fight with a local leader's son. Raju saves Shukla ,a good hearted wealthy girl from some thugs. Shukla introduces Raju to her father and hires him as a driver. And so their acquaintance leads to love.

title: Gandharwa
synopsis: Gandharwa is a unique story of a person who met with a incident which have changed his life and lost his identity . His Fight with Himself is great. They are much more surprising elements in Gandharwa.

title: Gangster Gangaraju
synopsis: Apart from wanting to win the girl he loves, Gangaraju, a good-for-nothing guy, becomes a Gangster to save his village.

title: Garbha
synopsis: An village backdrop story of family

title: Geetha
synopsis: Geeta (Hebba Patel) is a dumb orphan girl. She runs an orphanage with the support of her childhood deaf friend Valli (Priya) . Geeta and Priya gathers list like who are not having children than they ask or encourage to adopt those orphan children. In present situation of that society, who acts like good fellow in front of public named Bhagwan(Sai Kiran) with cruel mentality doing business with orphan children's organs, How Geetha (Hebba Patel) faced Bhagavan with the help of police Saradhi (Suneel). In this situations /sense Geeta lost her friend Valli (Priya) she exposes Bhagwan's Mafia to public. What is the previous relation between Geetha and Saradhi and why Saradhi had help to Geeta is the story.

title: Geometry Box
synopsis: An elderly couple's emotional journey to reconnect with their adult children.

title: Ghani
synopsis: The life of a boxer whose passion is sports who has been training since a young age to reach his dreams suddenly things take a tough turn which totally changes his life.

title: The Ghost
synopsis: An ex-Interpol officer wreaks havoc and sends shock waves across the global underworld but goes missing in action, only to remerge years later, for his beloved family.

title: Ginna
synopsis: In the backdrop of a small town, four childhood friends lead by Ginna who runs a tent house for his livelihood. Will Ginna reach his goal in the game of love and friendship?

title: Girlfriend Mood Swings
synopsis: Pavan struggles with his girlfriend's mood swings.

title: Godfather
synopsis: PNR a respected political leader passes away while heading the chair of Cheif Minister now the question remains who will take his throne.Narayana Verma one of the prominent leaders of his party considers himself to be the suitable candidate but people of the city are in favor of Brahma whose known as Godfather to everyone and has made a place in everyone's heart in a short time.PNR's daughter Satyapriya whose away from politics is also a considered as suitable candidate and being a step brother she is against Bramha.Her husband Dev takes this as an advantage and eye's the chair of Cheif Minsiter so that he could conduct a drug racket in the region and also tries to convince Brahma for the same.But Brahma is against this and spoils his plans for the same following which Dev frames him in a sexual molestation case of a women from his orphanage which lands Brahma in jail.While Brahma is serving his term in jail Dev plans to activate his drug racket but his plans are spoiled by Brahma's trusted aide Masoom Bhai.

title: Godse
synopsis: A reunion with friends changes the way Godse perceives the system. He begins to unravel the system's hidden agenda that robs off the careers and lives of students. What follows is a fight between Godse and the government for justice.

title: Good Luck Sakhi
synopsis: Plagued by seemingly endless bad luck, including the accidental death of her fiance, a young woman trains to compete as a sharpshooter at the national level.

title: Gully Gang
synopsis: A man named Malli, who was already in love with a girl, said to his friend Sreenu, "You love a girl like me too". On his way to college on the bus, Sreenu saw and laughed at three beautiful girls walking on the road. With their favorable response Sreenu immediately decided to love those three girls. But the decision left only disappointment. The villagers of the three girls noticed him. Result was multiple blows. Sreenu took the decision that he doesn't want to love anyone anymore. But the period is very tricky. Sreenu is used to boarding a running bus, but one day he slips while boarding the bus. A beautiful girl named Sandhya grabs his hand and protects him. Sreenu starts loving Sandhya from that day. Sreenu thought "Love is a blessing". One day when Sreenu proposes his love to Sandhya, she is frightened and calls "Anna". Frustrated with Sandhya's behavior, Sreenu decides that "love is a curse" "I will never love anyone again in my life," Sreenu promises to his friends. At the same time a boy comes there and tells Sreenu that a girl has come home. Immediately Sreenu changes his mind and leaves his friends and goes home to see that girl. Sreenu's friends were amazed at Sreenu's behavior. The story is what Sreenu did when he failed to fall in love with everyone he loved.

title: Gundamma Katha
synopsis: It revolves around the matriarch of the family named Gundamma, who is very traditional at heart and has always been very particular about the well-being of her family.

title: Gurthunda Seethakalam
synopsis: The film is set against an urban backdrop and Satya Dev will be stepping into the shoes of a middle-aged software employee who has endured several heartbreaks in his quest to find true love.

title: Half Stories
synopsis: Lakshmi, Chinna, and Shiva are friends who work together in organized crime but when something goes wrong they turn on each other.

title: Happy Birthday
synopsis: Defense Minister Ritwik Sodhi passes a gun amendment bill that enables one to own a gun. This is the story of how Happy, Lucky, Max Pain, Uncle Fixit, Serena and William's stories intertwine among themselves amidst passing of the gun bill.

title: Happy Birthday Priya
synopsis: Vinod has been waiting for Priya since many days. Still he did not see Priya, did not talk to her, they only love each other through text messages. One day Priya says to meet up the Vinod. But they can't meet because of one reason, this story line is about that reason. This is very emotional and heart touching story

title: Die Hard Fan
synopsis: Shiva is a fan of the famous actress Priyanka Sharma and has adored her from the beginning of her acting career. One night, Priyanka replies to his texts and accepts to meet him at his place after years of waiting. Why would a famous actress agree to meet with one of her fans among the millions? And what happened that night of the meeting, did Shiva invited Priyanka with any intention or Priyanka has her own plans? After this meet how they both faced the consequences?

title: Hello June
synopsis: A young girl who believes she lacks special talent but gradually matures into an independent woman.

title: Hero
synopsis: Arjun whose life takes a dramatic turn when he receives a gun in a courier. .

title: Hi Five: Fun and Gun
synopsis: A group of five girls who belong to rich families have lived all their lives under the strict supervision of their parents are thirsty to grab freedom, which in their sense is to experience things that they think they have missed out. They chalk out a plan and setup their teacher to propose a college trip to their parents to get acceptance. Once they reach their destination Goa, they spread their wings to utilise the opportunity. Unfortunately, they end up killing an unknown person accidentally every before they start anything. Their life becomes worse after a series of strange events when they meet a dreaded goon in a villa near the beach. What problems will they face in this journey with the goon? Will they get back to their homes?

title: Highway
synopsis: A photographer Vishnu falls in love with Tulasi, who was sheltered all her life. When everything is going great, his life turns upside down when a serial killer named 'D' kidnaps Tulasi. Will Vishnu able to save Tulasi in time?

title: HIT: The 2nd Case
synopsis: Krishna Dev aka KD, a laid back cop, works in AP HIT, has to take up a gruesome murder case. As KD unravels the layers of the crime, the stakes rise unbelievably high and the threat comes unusually close.

title: House No. 999
synopsis: It is unfortunate that Aswadhama's medication causes some unforeseen fatalities when he attempts to use it. When those ghosts begin stalking him and his family, he seeks refuge in his friend's house.

title: I Hate You - I Love You
synopsis: Virat wants to surprise his angry girlfriend Deepika who just decided to break up with him.

title: Identity
synopsis: Rishidev, an ACP of the Narcotics Control Bureau meets with an accident and loses his memory. Meanwhile, a person named Haran comes to the forefront for running a drug racket. Things take an interesting turn when NCB learns that Rishidev has been secretly running the drug racket under the identity of Haran.

title: Indirection
synopsis: It follows the story of a guy, who's stranded in a city with his friend due to a pandemic. What follows is a bizarre set of events from which he vicariously learns about his friend's plight.

title: Induvadana
synopsis: A forest officer who falls in love with a tribal girl named Indu(Farzana Shetty). As time passes by, even Indu okays Vasu's love.

title: Insecure
synopsis: Nandini develops labour pains and shi immediately drives the car on her own to hospital unable to bear the pain. Enrote, another car driven by fomous model Rahul hits nandini's car accidently. Nandini Nandini is injured but alive and is in desperate pain and pleads Rahul to save her but rahul pushes nandini's car into a deep valley and leaves the place, Nandini served from the car . Nandini wants to kill Rahul who is the cause for her shattered life. But she realizes that it is difficult to kill him as Rahul is a celebraty. So she hatches a plane along with her father and executing their plan.

title: Intinti Ramayanam
synopsis: Set in a backdrop against Karimnagar, Telangana, the close-knit family of Ramulu begin to doubt each other when they suddenly face a problem, and their hidden motivations and ambitions surface and create a domino effect on family members.

title: Iravatham
synopsis: Sloka (Tanvi Negi) works as a beautician in the movie industry. She is in a relationship with Chikku (Amardeep). On her birthday, Chikku gifts a fancy white camera to her. As Sloka is shooting the video, she sees her duplicate version of her in the video called princess. Maaya (Ester) tells about the camera specialty and also about Princess, who used to work as a model. What is the specialty of the camera? What happened to the princess? forms the basic plot of the Iravatham movie.

title: Itlu Maredumilli Prajaneekam
synopsis: A school teacher who is posted as an Election Officer in a rural mountainous village, makes sure that 100% voting happens there. However, he is forced to whisk away the voting machine to solve the societal issues prevailing in the village.

title: Jagannatakam
synopsis: How did an invisible positive energy (God) make the journey of six characters on a wrong path from two different stories, reach their correct destination again?? This is the story of this film Jagannatakam..

title: Jetty
synopsis: In Andhra Pradesh's Kataripalem, Katari Jalayya (MS Chowdary) is seen as a guiding force by fishermen. Like in the case of most trades, middlemen exploit the fishermen. To add to the woes of the poor, natural calamities like cyclones also affect their lives negatively. They rely on a Jetty (dock) to keep their boats from sinking. However, in order to get a Jetty, they have to go through a lot of hardship. Dasaratha Ramayya (Shivaji Raja), who is an MLA belonging to the opposition party, says that he can't ensure a Jetty. Meanwhile, the antagonist (Mime Gopi) has his own self-interest in preventing a Jetty from coming up. Amidst all this, Jalayya's daughter Meenakshi (Nandita Swetha) and her lover Sriram (Maanyam Krishna), who is a school teacher, have a stake.

title: John Luther
synopsis: The missing case of a teacher named Prakashan is reported at the police station where John Luther works as a CI. As the investigation progresses, John meets with an accident in a scuffle while investigating another case.

title: KALINGAPATNAM JEEVA
synopsis: Jeeva(Rithwik Ch) is a One-Eyed guy (right eye blind ) and has a phobia of Sharp objects . Sameera (chitra shukla) is a medico in KJ Village and her City friend Maya visits KJ n went missing in Kj . what happened to maya ? Varadhi has been murdered in kalingapatnam village. The Culprit is been in the village Inspite of being one eyed blind and has fear to sharp objects will Jeeva solve the mystery ? Did Varadhi really died ?

title: Karan Arjun
synopsis: Karan and Vrushali go to Rajasthan for their pre-wedding shoot where an anonymous person haunts and traps them. Why did he trap them? What will he do to them?

title: Karthikeya 2
synopsis: Before the Kalyug begins, Lord Krishna hands over an anklet that holds the answer to all of world's miseries. Years later a doctor finds himself in the thick of things when the pursuit for the anklet carries on. A doctor with a curious mind, Karthikeya, aka Karthik, believes in pursuing the truth. The quest leads Karthik to discover the power of the ancient Indian belief system and the essence of Krishna.

title: Kavisamrat
synopsis: Biography of Viswandha Satyanarayna. A Telugu Poet who ruled telugu literary world for five decades from 1920 to 1970

title: Kerosene
synopsis: The story revolves around victims who have been brutally raped, murdered and then burnt using Kerosene. While investigating the case, Vaibhav comes across a few more cases with the same Modus Operandi committed.

title: Khiladi
synopsis: A murder suspect escapes police custody due to criminologist Priya's misjudgment of her case for the thesis. Priya along with Arjun solves the mystery around the murder and money laundering which lead to the murder.

title: Kida
synopsis: In Tanapalli village, grandfather Seenaiah lives with grandson Ganesh and his pet goat. Their dreams interconnect with the goat's fate and the village butcher Veerasamy.

title: Konda
synopsis: A revolutionary and modernist, Konda Murali (Trigun) is a student at Lal Bahadur College, Warangal.
