synopsis: Sebastian is a police constable suffering from night blindness undergoes frequent transfers. When a murder takes place on his watch, how will he solve the crime?

title: Sedhyam
synopsis: Conflict between Dasarathayya (Father) and Abhiramudu (Son) about agriculture. At final how Abhiramudu change his mind and what are the factors that influenced him is all about the story.

title: Seetharamapuramlo Okapremajanta
synopsis: Shiva and Nandini fall in love with each other but their parents are political heads of the village then complications arise when they elope.

title: Seethayanam
synopsis: Carelessness can take lives out of hands in moments. There is danger roaming around us everyday, unnoticeably. Being alert is the only way to escape from them. Touching this concept with contemporary issues in a sensible yet hard-hitting way explains the evolving plot.

title: Sehari
synopsis: Shattered by his break-up, a disturbed young man Varun takes an instant decision to get married and things take a different turn for him as he ends up falling for the bride's sister Amulya instead during the bridal gaze.

title: Sembi
synopsis: A bus named Anbu narrates the stories of its 24 passengers, giving a glimpse of their journey from Kodaikanal to Dindigul.

title: Shekar
synopsis: A retired police officer with adept investigative skills, accidentally gets involved in a crime case after his ex-wife's unexpected demise.

title: Sirivennela
synopsis: A paranormal investigator finds herself face-to-face with the angry poltergeist of a young child with a dark and tragic past.

title: Sita Ramam
synopsis: Afreen is a student president of Pakistan at a university in London. She takes up the job of delivering a letter to Sita Mahalakshmi at the insistence of her grandfather's will. Though she doesn't like the job, she agrees to do it to get her share of her grandfather's property. The letter is written by Lieutenant Ram to Sita.

title: Siv Saagar's LIFT
synopsis: A Doctor travelling to her hometown agrees to help a group of people stranded on a highway because their car broke down. That group turns out to be a notorious criminal gang who try to assault her which leads her to stop the car in middle of a deep forest. She runs for her life and this criminal gang starts hunting her. Rest of the story depends on how she faces and wins this criminal gang, comes out from that deep forest and then unfolds the truth behind that horrific incident happened to her.

title: Sivudu
synopsis: The plot revolves around the crimes in a locality. A jolly youngster gets affected by the activities. His family and life get into danger. Things take a new turn as he decides to fight back.

title: Skandh
synopsis: Drama, Crime, A 6-year old boy was killed and born back to take revenge, finds his mother, and kills the killer.

title: Software Blues
synopsis: A story about an ambitious go-getter who feigns a good-looking girl, who holds a dream to fly to America. It is a journey through his trials and tribulations to win over her love.

title: Son of India
synopsis: Journey of a seasoned politician from a core party leader to the Chief Minister of a state, filled with achievements, manipulations, self - righteous attitude vs pure instinct, of finding despair in the midst of companionship.

title: Spark 1.0
synopsis: A story of two powerful police officers having conflicts and enmity each other in their profession. While one is accused of murder and another is assigned to investigate the murder.

title: Srirangapuram
synopsis: Peddi Reddy, respected for helping the needy in Sri Rangapuram village, confronts Konda Reddy's criminal acts of forcefully grabbing farmers' lands in the adjacent village. Enraged, Konda Reddy seeks revenge involving his niece.

title: Stand Up Rahul
synopsis: A feel-good romance comedy about a reluctant startup employee who doesn't stand up for anything in life, finally finding true love and learning to stand up for his parents, for his love and for his passion for stand-up comedy

title: Sundarangudu
synopsis: Sundar Raj is very rich and handsome guy. Mahalaxmi loves Sundar Raj, who is his own sister-in-law but he never cared her. Villan(Amith) saw mahalaxmi and frequently disturbs, harrases her to love and marry him. Sundar Raj have a friend named as Srinu. One day Sundar Raj saw a mass girl in a market named as Rowdy Rani. He impressed so much for her attitude and started loving. Daily observe her and one fine day he proposed her. Rowdy Rani likes Sundar Raj's courage and appreciates his courage. Next day some rowdies attacked on Rowdy Rani, At exact situation Sundar Raj enters and saves her. Later he is in coffee shop, He saw a beautiful girl and likes so much. One fine day decided to propose her and proposed with flowers but she harshly rejected him. He tries to propose Rowdy Rani also but she also rejected him. He completely disappointed and thinking during driving, unfortunately accident had happened. Sundar Raj's mother, father- in-law are feeling so sad. Mahalaxmi gave a support and had taken the all responsibilites of Sundar Raj and made him as a normal person. At that time he knows her value but he would like to teach a lesson for those 2 girls for rejecting him. He went to Himalayas and interacted with some saints. He got a Vasikarna powder to attract others, One of the saint warned him on further effect. Srinu knows the matter of Himalayas and robbed that powder and tried on 3 ladies but unfortunately they are she team. What are the problems Sundar Raj faced by the Vasikarnam and How he resolved it? Finally how he married the mahalaxmi is the whole concept.

title: Super Machi
synopsis: A humble middle class singer in his 20s get pursued by a beautiful woman who claims to be a girl friend whereas he hasn't seen that women in her life before. Things get mysterious and much complicated as he learns she officially registered herself as his wife without his knowledge..

title: Suraapanam
synopsis: Drinking 'Suraapanam' let's Shiva turn into an old man, a young boy and a kid everyday. Will there be any consequences? How will he deal with them?

title: Surabhi 70mm
synopsis: Surabhi 70mm is a good family drama with emotional narration .It deals with four stories which are linked with one cinema theatre . In Mancherial town five friends protect a thirty years old cinema theater called Surabhi 70mm which is the symbol of Narayanarao's love from a real estate rowdy.

title: Swa
synopsis: An Architect Abhi who rely on his rational mind, loses his lady love and suddenly finds his girlfriend out of nowhere, He resists to admit that she is real but she counters him by proving that she is as real as him - Abhi faces this friction and takes some actions in this state.. how his actions going to cost him is all this story about.

title: Swathi Muthyam
synopsis: A young man who is innocent and pure at heart celebrates life and love while his thoughts about marriage evolve.

title: Sweet Memories
synopsis: Prudhvi falls in love with a girl who got already engaged.

title: Tees Maar Khan
synopsis: A young boy and a girl from two broken families, escaping domestic violence and inhuman treatment, meet on a fateful night and instantly form a bond promising to help each other. She, being the eldest, provides him with food, and he vows to protect her. He calls her Amma. The boy christens himself Tees Maar Khan (Aadi) after beating up thirty bad men who pass lewd comments at his Amma. For him, she comes first, and their love has no bounds. A lonely police constable adopts these two homeless kids, and they become one family. Amma aka Vasu (Poorna) gets married to Chakri (Sunil). Tees Maar Khan grows into a strong youngster, runs a gym and even does minor settlements in his area. En route to one such settlement, he notices Anaga (Payal Rajput) mimicking his dance moves, falls in love with her, and even joins her college to impress her. Parallelly, Gija (Thakur Anoop Singh), a gangster, controls the entire city and spares no one meddling in his business. But Ranga Rajan (Srikanth Iyengar), the home minister, has other plans and wants to eliminate him at any cost. How did everyone's paths cross? What are the challenges Tees Maar Khan had to face? How did he become a police officer? Did he triumph in the end?

title: Terrace 13B Case
synopsis: On 25th April, 2011 a horrific and tragic incident occurred which remained unsolved. Till the date no explanation or evidence found to be satisfying to suggest what exactly happened on that day. This film is a record of those events. This film employed Documentary style of story telling.

title: Thaggedhe Le
synopsis: Thaggede Le story is about a murder investigation that revolves around nabbing of a drug lord. SI Chalapathy (Ravi Shankar) and his subordinate Raja (Raja Raveendra) bring Easwar (Naveen Chandra) , a software engineer to a Daba and start interrogating him over a murder case. Even as they are busy with their interrogation, the drug mafia is furious with the missing cartel and the dreaded Dandupalyam gang comprising gang leader Krishna (Makarand Desh Pande), Lakshmi (Pooja Gandhi), Chander (Ravi Kale), and others escape. Where this leads to and what is the connection to the murder mystery and how they are related to Eswar's wife Devi (Divya Pillai), Lizy (Ananaya SenGupta) form the crux of Thaggede Le.

title: Thank You
synopsis: After a dramatic event happens, a successful man reviews the impactful moments in his life.

title: That Is Mahalakshmi
synopsis: Mahalakshmi, a traditional girl sets out on a solo honeymoon after her marriage gets cancelled.

title: Thick & Thin
synopsis: Nithin, dumped recently due to being too skinny, goes into a self defeating journey of wanting to instantly transform himself. After torturing himself enough he turns to dating apps to vent out his frustration. Here is where a chance match with Karthika, a woman with a secure body image that things take a turn. A conversation with her and the advise that her father gave touches a deep chord in him, changing his perspective for good.

title: Thuglaq
synopsis: Director Bose is a celebrated film director with 6 super hit movies in his kitty. He begins his search for an untold story for his next movie. Bose unexpectedly meets writer Thuglaq who begins to narrate a story about Karthik and Haasini.12 years later, they meet each other again at a school as teachers. They then decide to part ways from there.Bose comes back the next day but the writer doesn't turn up. He is left clueless. What happened to Thuglaq? What inspired him to tell this story? Did he come back? Is there a Thuglaq part 2? How did Bose end the story?

title: Top Gear
synopsis: A taxi driver gets into trouble and is chased by police after taking a bag from a stranger.

title: Trikona
synopsis: The story of Trikona revolves around Nataraj (Suresh Heblikar), Kodandarama (Achyutha Kumar) and Trivikrama (Rajveer), heading towards Mangalore for different reasons. In between their journey at a remote area of the forest, all 3 cars stuck up with one problem simultaneously. From here the testing time Kaala (Marutesh) begins his play, as a valuator of patience. Nataraj (Suresh Heblikar) who is aged 65 is gifted with immense patience and even at this old age he needs to defeat one more problem, the only weapon he has is patience.

title: Twenty One Hours
synopsis: When a woman goes missing, everyone is suspected of her disappearance. Twenty One Hours is an investigative thriller about what happens in the hours after. Is everything as it seems or is there be a darker truth?

title: Uhinchaledhu Kadu
synopsis: Vasu, after recovering from an accident, finds five people following him everywhere. Later, on confrontation, he discovers that they are ghosts of the accident victims, who require a favour from him.

title: Uniki
synopsis: IAS officer Subha fights corruption, survives attack, teams with cop Abhi. They expose evil network, face danger, win justice and change region.

title: Urvasivo Rakshasivo
synopsis: A modern take on urban relationships.

title: V100
synopsis: The story revolves around the incidents happening at 100th milestone in a forest region

title: Vaade Veedu
synopsis: VaadeVeedu is a most Romantic suspense thriller film. Series of unfortunate events occur when a husband is deceived by his wife. His only mistake was to trust and love her passionately.

title: Vala
synopsis: The game called Arya deposits a huge amount of cash every time a player completes a level, but if they don't, their loved one's life is in danger. Will the local detective team stop it before it's too late?

title: Valliddari Madhya
synopsis: Valliddari Madhya is a telugu language love story between a conservative man and modern women. The story revolves around their struggle to find love between them and elsewhere. With the arrival of antagonists from unexpected place, the story goes through a roller coaster of fun and emotions.

title: Veyi Subhamulu Kalugu Neeku
synopsis: To fulfill an oath to his father, Chaithu, a successful TV show director saves each penny to buy his dream house. After buying the house, he faces unexpected problems that keeps his girlfriend at bay. What will he do?

title: Vintha! Vintha! Vintha!
synopsis: The story follows Buchi Babu, a petty thief and a single father who accidentally discovers the identity of Hyderabad's Superhero Vintha Jeevi. Since he has a hard time earning through thieving, he decides to sell Jeevi's identity for bounty. But the more he gets to know about VJ's alter ego, the more hesitant he becomes about revealing the identity.

title: Virata Parvam
synopsis: Set against the backdrop of the Naxal movement in 1990s Telangana

title: Virgin Story
synopsis: Two heart broken teenagers who spend a roller coaster night out enduring the most whacky and witty characters to find their solace. Will this night out soothe them with what true love is ?? A slice of life wacky romedy for youth, Virgin story explores the crazy fast paced world of love, break ups, rebounds, demystifying the age old rules and kicking the limits. Welcome to experience the crazy nights, mad friends, and amazing memories.

title: Vishwak
synopsis: Young graduate, who has inventive concepts, wants to launch a business and relocate to his hometown. He is advised to relocate abroad by his father and potential investors. What would his next step be?

title: The Warriorr
synopsis: When Satya raises his voice against Guru, the latter revolts and bashes the former to hell. Satya makes a comeback as a cop to take revenge on Guru and put an end to his crime in Kurnool city.

title: Welcome to Tihar College
synopsis: Tihar college is about the education system prevailing in India. In the pursit of ranks and marks many students are commiting suicides. This film deals with their emotions, their dreams and aspirations.

title: When Best Friend Secretly Loves You
synopsis: Mamatha and Siddhu are best friends who secretly love each other.

title: Why? Endhuku?
synopsis: A screenwriter with writer's block finds himself caught between what is wrong and right, while three young men deal with over-ambition

title: The World of Kapata
synopsis: While in conversation with the masks in his house, an old man discovers the backstabbing realities from his past which depicts the fakeness of the world he lives in.

title: Writer
synopsis: The gripping tale of a murder surrounding a mystery will lead to surprising revelations. the story revolves around a murder investigation wherein the culprit confesses his crime but the circumstances point into a different direction

title: Yashoda
synopsis: In a highly regimented facility housing surrogate mothers woman named Yashoda discovers that things are not as they seem. Yashoda An innocent woman, agrees to be a surrogate mother due to her circumstances. She then finds herself trapped in a world of uncertainties.

title: Yemaipothaney
synopsis: Jyotish, a young and talented but jobless chap falls head over heels for Shubhani, a lovely girl who doesn't believe in love. Jyotish's life takes a roller coaster ride once Shubhani notices his interest towards her.

title: Yutha Satham
synopsis: A young woman is murdered right in front of a police station. The inspector at the station suspects her boyfriend, a private detective, who claims he is innocent.

title: Zinga
synopsis: a giant alien come to earth from the fictional planet of DHANDOK. Why the alien comes to earth, lands in Rajasthan and what happens next forms the crux of the tale.

title: #Krishnarama
synopsis: Septuagenarian Krishna Rama a family 16, kids well settled abroad. The growing gap between them force this couple to join FB as kids are more avable there, but they couldnt adjust on SM leading their 50 year marriage to divorce and suicide

title: #MayaLo
synopsis: A road trip leads Krish and Sindhu to uncover how their lives intertwined due to the influential and charming Maya.

title: #Mentoo
director: Srikanth G Reddy, K. Sudheer Kumar
synopsis: A group of men from different sections of society faces discrimination from Pseudo feminists. They decide to fight with #MenToo because they believe men are victims too.

title: 7:11 PM
synopsis: The incident that takes place at 7:11 PM changes the fate of a town called Hamsala Deevi and a planet called Proxima-EV12. Ravi travels beyond imagination through time to stop a criminal mastermind, save his loved ones and his beloved town

title: The 9X10=91
synopsis: Proffesor narrates the story of Rohit and explained how the next generation should think

title: 10 Rupees
synopsis: Rambabu and Viswanatham are two friends who stuck in the problems at individual reasons. On the idea of Rambabu, they both decided to do a Scam named "PROJECT 10RUPEES" to overcome their problems.. What is the Scam they gonna do ? Why they named it 10RUPEES for the scam? What's the role of Pavithra in it ? What was the link to Surya and Mukhtar khan related in this Flick ? Finally did they succeded in that Scam?? To all these reasons you should watch 10RUPEES movie.

title: Aadiguruvu Amma
synopsis: The first teacher of the universe is not some bearded sage, but Mother. Mother is one's first and foremost teacher. She teaches discipline even while one is in the womb. She feeds faith to one with her milk.

title: Aadikeshava
synopsis: A turn of events takes an urban-bred guy into the heart of Rayalaseema, where there are scores to settle.

title: Abhilasha
synopsis: SRIRAM WHO IS A BTECH GRADUATE GROWN UP UNDER HIS UNCLE AND AUNTY WORKS AS A MECHANIC WILL GOES TO VIZAG FOR AN INTERVIEW. ACCIDENTALLY HE MEETS VYDEHI WHO IS AN IAS ASPIRANT AND LOVES HER FOR HER OPEN AND FRANKNESS HE SUDDENLY KNOWS HER FLASH BACK AS SHE IS FROM A UNLIGHTENED VILLAGE WHERE PEOPLE ARE STRUGGLING WITHOUT GETTING THERE BASIC NEEDS AND EDUCATION BECAUSE OF LANDLORD AND PRESIDENT PASUPATHI HOW VYDEHI BECOMES AN IAS TO SAVE HER VILLAGE AND HOW HER LOVE TOWARDS HER VILLAGE AND LOVE OF THE PEOPLE OF VILLAGE BY CHANGING PRESIDENT PASUPATHI. SRIRAM ON HER LIGHTENED THE LIFE'S OF BOTH AND THE PEOPLE OF VILLAGE BY CHANGING PRESIDENT PASUPATHI.

title: The Accident
synopsis: When Rachel discovers that her twin sister was actually killed in cold blood and did not die in a car accident, she must incite her sister's spirit to take revenge on the killer.

title: Adavi Donga
synopsis: ADAVI DONGA DEPICTS THE STRUGGLES AND THE WOREST LIFE OF LABOURS WHO WENT FOR CUTING RED SANDAL WOOD, WHICH OCCURED NEAR DEVARA KONDA OF SESHACHALAMFOREST. SHIVA [HERO] LEADER OF RED SANDAL WOOD CUTTERS,LED TO FIGHT AGAINST THE DON OF RED SANDAL SMUGGLER RAGHAVA REDDY,& CORRUPTED POLICE OFFICER.

title: Addateegala
synopsis: A vacation to Maredimilli takes an eerie turn when a psycho killer enters the lives of a software couple, Abhi and Satya. Brace yourself for a series of chilling events as suspense builds and their fight for survival begins.

title: Adipurush
synopsis: Raghava prince of Ayodhya goes to exile to live in forests for fourteen years with his wife Janaki and brother Sesh.As per the orders by his father Dashratha on request of his step mother Kaikaee.Lankesh a ten headed demon king from Lanka wants to attain salvation he meets his sister after Shurpanakha after a long with a broken nose.Shurpanakha tells him that she fell in love with Raghava the king of Ayodhya who rejected her for the most beautiful women in kingdom of Ayodhya his wife Janaki.When she tried to rebel against it her nose was partly chopped of by Sesh younger brother of Ragahava.Shurpanakha wants Lankesh to take her revenge who kidnaps Janaki and takes her to Lanka.A helpless Raghava and Sesh come across an old women Shabari who tells them that in the mountainous regions Sugriv can aide him.Raghava meets Bajrang and takes him to Sugriv who has lost his kingdom to his brother and can be of less help.But along with help of Raghava ,Sugriv wins his kingdom back and he sends Bajrang to Lanka to find details of Janaki.Bajrang reaches Lanka and challenges the kingdom where Lankesh's wife Mandodari predicts Lankesh that the destruction of Lanka is near.

title: Ado Deyyam Katha
synopsis: The films revolves Around three main characters, out of which one character is a groovily ghost, with deathly emotions, wanting and waiting to bleed the victim, but the other characters are not aware. The soul is embalmed around the farm house and the tamarind grove. The lead character is curious about this presence and is interested to know her past. As time progresses the soul believes the human and reveals her past seeking his help, but the twist and turns in the movie makes the lead the victim.

title: Agent
synopsis: A spy with a mysterious past, who is on a mission to uncover the truth about a dangerous terrorist organization.

title: Ahimsa
synopsis: A youngster who follows the path of non-violence and finally revolts to a different path to get justice for his family.

title: Ala Ninnu Cheri
synopsis: A girl born into a wealthy family, falls for a boy who is driven towards his goal. On proposing marriage to him, he chooses his goal. Will she marry someone else? Will he achieve his goal?

title: Amigos
synopsis: Siddharth (Kalyan Ram), a youngman who runs a family business is astonished to find his doppelgängers Manjunath (Kalyan Ram) and Michael (Kalyan Ram) on getdopple.com . After meeting up in Goa, they come down to Hyderabad to help Siddarth win over Ishika (Ashika Ranganath), a girl looking for superman to be her husband. But things take a drastic turn when NIA swings into action to nab Michael, aka Bipin Roy. So what's Bipin's plan, and how did it affect the lives of Siddharth and Manjunath?

title: Anantha
synopsis: Prof. Radesh's farewell party becomes a mysterious interrogation after he reveals that he has a longer and way stranger past.

title: Andhakaaram
synopsis: 'Manu' is a professional writer who falls for the trap of 'Writer's Block' which descends his life into the darkness.

title: Aneethi
synopsis: A food delivery guy, finds himself captivated by Subbu's (Dushara) charm. However, their lives take a tumultuous turn when a series of unexpected events unfold, plunging them into a chaotic world

title: Annapurna Photo Studio
synopsis: Chanti leads a simple yet comfortable life. Chanti's father is a renowned astrologer. He opens a photo studio and names it after his mother. One day Chanti and his friend Prasad notice a goon chasing a girl and attempt to save her.

title: Anni Manchi Sakunamule
synopsis: A guy who is very optimistic in life, though he is a big failure, falls in love with a girl. There are no good terms between the two families. The two try to get approval from their family members for a wedding.

title: Anu
synopsis: A beautiful picnic ends up in a tragedy when a baby slips into waterfalls and dies. While entire family in deep sorrow, home maids and family members experiences paranormal activities.

title: Anukunnavanni Jaragavu Konni
synopsis: "Karthik , Madhu who are striving for a financial gain, collide in a hilarious yet bewildering hotel crime, embarking on a roller coaster journey to clear their names and how to solve crime case in this uproarious, crime comedy thriller."

title: Arangetram
synopsis: Ajay, a psychotic killer, sneak into girl's home to kill her. Unexpectedly, a few intruders enter the same home, thwarting his plan. What happens next?

title: Asalu
synopsis: A professor is murdered while he is taking class to his students on a zoom call. Officer Ranjith is assigned to this case, who reveals that the situation is much more complicated than it appears with 4 suspects and strong motives.

title: Ashtadigbandhanam
synopsis: Gautham is a software engineer. Chakri is a corrupt police officer. Shankar is a bar owner. Sri Ramulu is a politician. These four who are not related to each other meet on one occasion. After that unexpected changes take place in their lives. Terrible problems arise. Who survived them? Who is oppressed? What and why those problems arose and who won is the rest of the story.

title: Asvins
synopsis: A group of Youtubers who accidentally unleash a 1500-year-old evil that crosses over from the realm of darkness to the human world.

title: Atharva
synopsis: A policeman from the clues department tries to unravel murder mystery. When the investigation becomes more complex, it leads to a twisted path. Will he be able to unravel the chain of mystery?

title: B&W
synopsis: Swaranjali is a painter with aspirations of becoming one of the world's greatest painters. During this process, she develops a new type of live musical painting in which she paints while dancing to the music. Vardhan is an aspiring music director who works for film industry. Due to lack of opportunities, he was unable to become what he desired, and in his frustration, he became addicted to drugs. Yamini, as a singer, aspires to reach greater heights in the music industry with her singing talent. She hangs out a lot and doesn't take things seriously in the process, all three become good friends, and because Swaranjali and Vardhan love each other, they begin a living relationship, with Swaranjali morally and financially supporting Vardhan. In the process of introducing her live music painting theme to the world, she meets famous event organizer Rakesh, but Rakesh, being a playboy, wants every girl to be around him rather than helping them. As a neighbor, Papua irritates Swaranjali by knowing about her relationship with Vardhan and tries to attract her while she avoids him. Swaranjali planned a surprise party for Vardhan's birthday and invites all for the party. Vardhan was discovered dead in Swaranjali house on the same day.How does Swaranjali get out of this murder mystery and achieve her goal?

title: Baby
synopsis: Two high-school sweethearts face challenges in their relationship when they take different directions in life.

title: Badmash Gallaki Bumper Offer
synopsis: Two boys kidnapped their boss, who is doing illegal business in real estate for money.. after that they saw the shocking matters.. what's that shocking news and they get money , what they want is the movie story.. it's a full commercial entertainment.

title: Bairan Palli
synopsis: Watch this complex tapestry of murder, intrigue, and deception unravel. Are the four upstarts behind it all or are they being framed? Does evil really walk among them or is it the fear and paranoia gripping the minds of the villagers.

title: Balagam
synopsis: In a village in Telangana, a family head Komarayya (Sudhakar Reddy), full of life and vigour, passes away unexpectedly. Sailu (Priyadarshi), his grandson (the son of his eldest son), is in debt and believes that getting married and receiving dowry money will help him pay it off. Sailu's engagement has been put on hold due to the passing of Komarayya.

title: Bedurulanka 2012
synopsis: Set in Bedurulanka - 2012, this story explores the morality of people during the paranoia about the end of the world on December 21, 2012. As some greedy village men try to benefit by exploiting human fear, how the protagonist made them realize and confess the deeds amidst interesting drama in a entertaining way.

title: Bhaag Saale
synopsis: A smart and young chap knots into a big trouble: he must defy a big time goon, to retrieve something priceless and gain back his love.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
synopsis: Nelakonda Bhagavanth Kesari is adamant about getting even with a powerful businessman who cost him money. He is prepared to square off against the formidable foe and resolve their issues amicably.

title: Bhari Taraganam
synopsis: "Bhari Taraganam" is a Telugu film that showcases the importance of acting. The movie narrates four stories that revolve around a father and daughter, husband and wife, a boss and his personnel secretary, and the main male and female leads. Throughout all four stories, the female lead is shown to be naturally helpful and risks everything to help those in need. The female lead takes advantage of her boyfriend's weakness to make their plans more believable.

title: Bheemadevarapally Branchi
synopsis: Jampanna, a Villager from Native Telangana of Mallapur spends all the money that gets credited in his account thinking it as one of governments freebies. This welcomes new problems in his life, how he gets back up is the story.

title: Bholaa Shankar
synopsis: While attempting to build a life in Kolkata with his sister, a taxi driver must confront his dark past as he faces off against the city's underworld.

title: Bhuvana Vijayam
synopsis: Eight strangers with different backgrounds and problems compete in a high-stakes challenge for a chance to win life-changing rewards, but they soon discover that one of them will pay the ultimate price.

title: Bitcoin
synopsis: Two friends plan to swindle a stranger

title: Boo
synopsis: Four friends gather to celebrate Halloween. They begin reading an horror novel. Things take a strange turn as they begin to experience bizarre events while reading the book. Will they be able to escape the spirit that haunts them?

title: Breakout
synopsis: Maniratnam, an aspiring filmmaker with monophobia, visits Hyderabad for a narration but fails. Unable to reach his friend for accommodation, he's offered shelter by Raju, a local mechanic.

title: Breakup Settlement
synopsis: Pardhu sues Madhu for a breakup settlement, and what Madhu decided to do makes up the story.

title: Breakup Stories
synopsis: An anthology of three stories revolving around the lives of three women dealing with toxicity, patriarchy and self-doubt at different stages of their relationships.

title: Breathe
synopsis: The Chief Minister collapses during golf, leading to hospitalization. Sinister murder attempts follow. Alerted, Abhi partners with his professor, working to save the Minister and reveal the perpetrators.

title: Bro
synopsis: An arrogant man is given a second chance to fix his mistakes after death.

title: Bubblegum
synopsis: Aadi and Jhanvi, from different backgrounds, struggle with doubts and challenges in their relationship, questioning if love can overcome their differences.

title: Burning Bridges
synopsis: Burning Bridges delves into the human stories behind the helmets, the unseen struggles of Telangana's firefighters. We witness the emotional toll, the interactions with the public, and the quiet acts of heroism that often fade from memory.

title: Butta Bomma
synopsis: Satya, a girl from a village in Araku who falls in love with Murali, an auto driver she has never met, over the phone.

title: Calling Sahasra
synopsis: Cyber expert Ajay joins new job but past tragedy motivates avenging crimes on women using RESQ app anonymously. Mass calls draw him into murder case amidst rescuing women.

title: Capture (A Film by Dhanadhar)
synopsis: Dhana is a photographer and house arrested himself for a year because of his girlfriend's death. The story revolves around the camera which is connected to the killer organization's cloud, so whoever photos with details uploaded in the cloud are going to die by the next day. synopsis: Mahishasurudu movie is a family crime thriller movie. An unknown person comes to a house in an unusual circumstances saying that he is the missing person /brother in that family, after a death happens to a person in an accident. Though, initially the family including his wife were suspicious, as he solves many problems of that family, gradually he gains the confidence of them. At that moment, sudden mysterious murders happen to both of his brothers. In view of prior relationship the daughter in law was the prime suspect. However, the new intruder who claims as the husband of that lady has any role and who is the final culprit is the story. Who is that killer family member or unknown person. The story revolves around a reputed family .the whole story happens. Though the theme is a family suspense thriller, it revolves around an important medical invention .What is the link and who is the suspect is the main story.

title: Malli Pelli
synopsis: Narendra, the famous actor, who hails from a big family, falls in love with Parvathi, his co actor and a married woman. Can he face the complexities to pursue her?

title: Mangalavaaram
synopsis: Fear engulfs a village as murders pile up mysteriously. Shailu, a young woman is the heart of the story and the enigmatic tale unravels with a suspenseful cinematic journey.

title: Manucharitra
synopsis: Manu, a genius at academic level, eventually turns into a thug. Things change when he falls in love. Can he get his life back on the right track before it's too late?

title: Maro Prapancham
synopsis: There are many mysteries in this whole universe that are beyond the comprehension and beyond the imagination of the human brain. One of them is Parallel universe concept". The story is about 5 friends on a trip meets their replicas from other Universe and how it changes their lives.

title: Martin Luther King
synopsis: A man without a name or identity is suddenly wooed by two warring groups when he gets a Voter ID. Will he reap the benefits of his privilege or use it as a tool for social change?

title: Matti Katha
synopsis: Set in a rustic village near Hyderabad, this evocative story follows three college-bound friends, their youthful joys, and the loss of cherished ancestral land. A gripping family drama unfolds, unveiling a village leader's sinister conspiracy.

title: Mayagadu
synopsis: A man involved in film piracy, who leaks Telugu movies online, ends up falling in love with a film producer's daughter, which leads to a twist in his life.

title: Mayapetika
synopsis: The journey of a mobile through various hands, revealing glimpses of life stories impacted and motivated by the mobile, sometimes for the better or for the worse.

title: Meet Cute
synopsis: " This is a beautiful , cute and emotional love story about a guy named Karthik, who is a boy next door type character. In an unexpected event he meets his first love , Anu. But they don't have much time left to spend with each other because she needed to be somewhere else next day . So, they decides to spend the night together, which leads to an ambitious ending. "

title: Mem Famous
synopsis: A high energy youthful journey filled with amazing moments of friendship, love, family all set up in a beautiful and colorful village.

title: Meter
synopsis: Arjun Kalyan reluctantly becomes a police officer to fulfill his father's dream, then an unexpected turn of events forces him to go head-to-head with the home minister of the state.

title: Michael
synopsis: Set in the early 1990s, Michael, a simple yet daring boy from the south moves to Bombay with a strong motive that's personal to him, grow under the wings of Gurunath, a dreaded gangster. Michael is assigned with a task of killing the man involved in the attempted assassination of Gurunath. Things take a turn as he falls in love with the target's daughter, Theera, in Delhi.

title: Michael Gang
synopsis: Michael is the story of an orphan named Michael and his friends who started with nothing and became one of the most powerful people.

title: Midnight Killers
synopsis: Abhi and friends go to forest to enjoy. There, friends die one by one in unexpected circumstances. Abhi's lover Nivedha also dies and he wants to avenge his death. This story is about who got the money in the end.

title: Miss Shetty Mr Polishetty
synopsis: Miss Shetty is a feminist living in London and wants to be single forever. Mr. Polishetty from Hyderabad in Telangana, India, wants to be in a committed relationship. The two appear to be in different stages of life but somehow connect.

title: Mistake
synopsis: Three easygoing friends who shares a single flat in Jubilee Hills Basthi. The mistakes they make brings them life threats of being killed, therefore these three young men plan to abscond along with their girlfriends.

title: Mon Ampere
synopsis: On the verge of healing his broken heart and loneliness in a pandemic set lockdown, a modern Indian tech employee falls in love with a ghost that's haunting his electronic appliances. Amidst the struggle to enhance this platonic and literally spiritual romance, he has to fight his father's conventional way of life, the lockdown relaxation and find a way to stay united with this 'soul'mate.

title: Month of Madhu
synopsis: A 19 year, Indian origin girl, born in the US, visits Vizag to attend a cousin's wedding. In her search for freedom, she embarks on a 1 month journey with a 42 year separated, jobless man who has nothing but freedom in his life. This beautiful, sarcastic tale of Madhumathi and Madhusudan Rao opens up a plethora of emotions.

title: Mr. King
synopsis: Shiva is an RJ who is doing his thesis on airplane mechanism while Seetharama is cunning and complex. Umadevi and Vennela both fell in love with Shiva. How will Shiva untangle the love triangle and manage Seetharama Raju's twisted game?

title: Mr. Pregnant
synopsis: Follows Gautham, who marries Mahi and decides to carry her child himself and deliver the baby. The couple must face the ire of society as a result of their choice, including dealing with the reaction from everyone and their families.

title: Music School
synopsis: This heart-warming 11-song musical is about how the prevailing Indian education system and parents put pressure on children to be competitive in their "studies, thereby leaving no time for art and culture. Against this background, two music and drama teachers Mary and Manoj struggle to put up "The Sound of Music".

title: My Name Is Shruthi
synopsis: My Name Is Shruthi is an intriguing thriller which is based on Organ Mafia. Indian cinema has number of movies on organ mafia, but "My Name Is Shruthi" stands apart as it deals with skin mafia, which is first of its kind movie, which gives audience a new experience. Director Srinivas Omkar has researched on this subject to the core and tried to translate it on screen to make it gripping thriller. It will surely succeed in convincing the audience.

title: Mystery
synopsis: The scenes of the murder in a farm house are important to the movie on three aspects: how did it happen, who did it and why did it happen.

title: Naa Nee Prema Katha
synopsis: Naa nee Prema Katha is a beautiful love story set in a village setting. Nandini, the daughter of the zamindar of that village, loves a boy named Nani, who is a paper boy from the same village.Guna from the same village also loves the same girl. A triangle love story between these three.

title: Naa Roja Nuvve
synopsis: Nandu arranges a meeting with his GF and his mom, and it doesn't go as he thought it would be.

title: Narakasura
synopsis: In a realm of coffee and pepper, Shiva's vanishing act sparks a journey of secrets, love, and power. Amid the chaos, a hidden romance, and a transgender community's struggle, lead to a gripping climax of sacrifices and a cataclysmic clash.

title: Narayana & Co
synopsis: A middle-class family in financial distress agrees to an illegal deal and embarks on a hilarious journey to overcome their problems, discovering the true meaning of family in the process.

title: Natho Nenu
synopsis: Unmarried, 60 year old man, who lives his life in real estate in Hyderabad. He keeps rising step by step and building apartments with modern facilities.

title: Nede Vidudala
synopsis: The world of "online film piracy" and the protagonist cracks down on it forms the crux that dwells into the story.

title: Nee vente nennu
synopsis: "A Father who initially disagrees with his daughter's love. Later get self-realized and starts searching for his daughter's lover. Will he be able to find his daughter's lover? Can he fill back the happiness in her life is

title: Neethone Nenu
synopsis: Neethone Nenu Story starts In a government school of Telangana, Ayesha joins as a physical training teacher and makes a good bond with her fellow teacher and falls for his kindness. Soon she finds out that he is suffering with a psychological disorder caused by a miserable past. What Ayesha did to make ram a better person is the rest of the film Plot.

title: Nelluri Nerajana
synopsis: A traditional family who not intrest on love marriages and in his family his daughter loves Surya and how there family makes them separate and how they make there love success

title: Nene Naa
synopsis: Divya is a talented archaeologist, and the Nalgonda police department seeks her help to proceed with a murder case that occurred in a dense forest under suspicious circumstances. A shocking truth is uncovered during the investigation.

title: Nene Saroja
synopsis: Discrimination and unequal treatment towards girls is ongoing in our society even to this day. If a girl falls in love, her father takes her life, if she doesn't fall in love, a psycho would take her life. There is no recognition to her tastes and individuality. This movie is an effort to make you think on how to bring up the change.

title: Nenu Student Sir!
synopsis: Subbu, a college student, buys an iPhone and gets entangled in a murder case linked to the device. He receives a large sum of money in his bank account and faces challenges proving his innocence.

title: Nijam 2023
synopsis: R.P is a people's man who dictates the government. For the welfare of the home minister, DCP Murali along with Karthik want to kill R.P. Will they be successful?

title: Nindu Chandamama
synopsis: Siri, a heroine on rise visits Araku for vacation. She falls in love with the resort owner Varun. Gayatri, the fiancee of Varun tries to break the couple with help of family members. How Varun is brought back forms the crux of the story with some extraordinary songs.

title: Ninnu Chere Tharunam
synopsis: Radha, a blind guy meets Krishna when things are not fine in their lives. Radha hides his disability to Krishna and faces a lot of problems.

title: Okkade 1(Venkanna on Duty)
synopsis: The story starts with the murder of a businessman's family in the City. The police department appoints a special officer named Venkanna from Mumbai to catch those responsible for the murder. Venkanna comes to Hyderabad and takes charge.

title: Okkade Veerudu
synopsis: Rama Raju's father told Rama Raju in his childhood that we are living as slaves in our country, and the king was angry with the British. At the age of 16, the king returned to Uttara Deshatana and returned to Manya.

title: Okkaroju... 48 Hours
synopsis: Okka Roju is a Telugu movie starring Aaditya Reddy Badveli and Rekha Nirosha in the lead.

title: One More Chance
synopsis: God gives one more chance to his devotee to go to his past and correct his mistake.

title: Oo Antava Maava Oo Ooo Antava Maavaa
Organic Mama Hybrid Alludu
synopsis: After Vijay, a director, goes on hiatus after his films fail, he falls in love with the daughter of a farming tycoon. While he tries to impress her father, he receives the chance to make a hit movie.

title: Oy Junior!
synopsis: Siddhu irritates his junior Manju with tasks.

title: Palle Gootiki Pandagochindhi
synopsis: In a village called Sathyavaram, two young men named Anand and Santos are the leaders of Anushka and Nayantara's fence. But to see who will be the greatest, they decide to build idols of Anushka and Nayantara in 3 months.

title: Panchayiti
synopsis: A village drama set in the deep rural space of Telengana, with gritty looks, stellar performances and great imagery.

title: Pareshan
synopsis: Set up in the backdrop of Singareni and Coalaries, the movie sheds light on troubles that arise between friends, family and lovers.

title: Park
synopsis: Story of a boy who tries to commit suicide is survived unexpectedly and comes across with an young and beautiful girl soumya. She is trying to elope from the house with her boyfriend and waiting for him in a park in disguise. The interaction of the hero and heroine leads to another beautiful love story where the boy teaches her "love" and the girl teaches him "life". Whether hero and heroine are joined together or not is the rest of the story.

title: Partner
synopsis: Best friends who steal for a living. When they try to steal from a scientist, One of them falls trap to one of his scientific experiments, transforming him into a woman.

title: Patnagarh
synopsis: Inspired from a shockingly true incident of Hate and Revenge. The film is an investigative thriller that explores the mind-set of a criminal hiding in plain sight. A newly married couple receives a gift box five days after their wedding, their happiness turns short lived when the gift turns out to be a bomb that kills the husband and his grandmother and seriously injuring the wife. A massive investigation begins to find the killer.

title: Pattu- Story of Fabric
synopsis: This project is a short documentary about Odisha's Silk city and its weavers who have been facing difficulties recently being members of co-operative societies.

title: Peddha Kapu 1
synopsis: A common man enters a village's political arena, which has been dominated by two political parties.

title: Perfume
synopsis: The smell is an innate quality of all creatures; they recognize their mating time and desire of the opposite sex through smell. But humans lost their innate quality to smell and recognize the mating desire of the opposite sex. A guy named Veda is an Aroma Photographer, and he has that innate natural smelling capacity, but it looks odd to the world and modern science is calling it Hyperosmnia, and he becomes a victim. He gets obsessed with a particular smell, and that smell becomes his obsession, and he searches for it.

title: Phalana Abbayi Phalana Ammayi
synopsis: Revolves around the relationship of the lead pair over the period of a decade.

title: Pindam
synopsis: A speech-impaired six-year-old girl becomes the vessel for a powerful spirit hell-bent on destruction.

title: Pizza 3: The Mummy
synopsis: The protagonist on a probe to solve a series of murders that take place exactly where he delivers food.

title: Plot
synopsis: A failed businessman, finally, tastes success in real estate. This turns into an obsession and now he would go to any extent to do business and not fail.An anonymous person threatens him to stop his successful business.

title: Popcorn
synopsis: Sameerana and Pavan, who are strangers, meet with an extreme anger on each other will get stuck in a lift . How the emotions unfold beautifully between them and fall in sincere love in 18 hours is the story. From the extreme anger situation between both of them to how the emotion unfolds among them is the drive with embarrassing, anger, joyful, emotional, thrilled and tensed situations.

title: Poye Enugu Poye
synopsis: Ramu's father is a hunter, Jagga get a map of treasure. One Swamiji tells to sacrifice a baby elephant, so hunter gets elephant calf, Ramu finds out that the baby elephant finally elephant calf unite with mother, he changes his father mind

title: Prathyardhi
synopsis: Prathyardhi revolves around a mysterious case of a missing person Vijay.Sub inspector Krishna considers it a case of murder and police arrest the suspects.What happens when an unexpected rival springs out with new revelations?

title: Prem Kumar
synopsis: Most Indian romantic dramas end with the heroine getting married, the hero interrupts the wedding, convinces the heroine's parents and runs into the sunset with the heroine. And the curtains are down, but no one, not even the audience, doesn't care about the guy who was about to get married to the heroine. His dreams, aspirations, money spent on his own wedding etc., are less cared for by everyone. Prem Kumar is one such bridegroom and this is the story of his most unfortunate or funny or an untold agony.

title: Prema Desapu Yuvarani
synopsis: Cherry a village grown up boy will be lazy and irresponsible, inspite of having smoking and drinking habits he never tries to flirt/seduce a girl which makes his friends get irritated and they plan to make cherry loose his virginity by arranging a Prostitute, during the process of this plan accidentally Cherry finds a beautiful girl Sravani enjoying nature and falls for her and leaves that place in that love at first sight kind of trance. Sravani is a matured and Responsible Girl having Clarity on Career and Future, Sravani and her Family returned to Vil- lage after many years, Sravani completes her education in the city and prepares for civils/groups in the village and teaches Classical Dance for village students and she is the daughter of cherry's father's friend. Cherry's father worrying about his education requests Sravani to guide him to complete backlog Subjects, which makes Cherry happy as he can impress her and make her to fall in love, in this Journey Sravani falls for Cherry's Innocence but hides her Love, one Fine day she Expresses her Love to Cherry. Parallely a suspense track of regular murders of followers of veerayya, who is a cruel local don happens in and around the village, and these murders are investigating by the police officer SI shanker but finds no clues. Cherry being fed up with the irresponsible behaviour of Sravani for his Marriage Proposal, strongly asks the reason for her irresponse and now Sravani Emotionally starts explaining her reason leading to flashback.

title: Prema Katha
synopsis: Prem, a middle class boy falls in love with his friend's fiance's female friend will his love get's succeed or ends up as tragic? is the remaining story. The story set back in a metaphoric representation of the intellect world to the real world gives us Prema Katha.

title: Prema Vimanam
synopsis: Two kids with a dream to board a flight cross paths with a young couple who must urgently catch the flight to start a new life.

title: Premadesam
synopsis: Arjun (Thrigun), a chilled and mojo guy, falls in love with Aadhya (Megha Akash), his junior in college. Though both of them like each other, they never express themselves. Madhumathi (Madhoo Shah), Arjun's mother, in a way, plays cupid. In another parallel track, Shiva (Shivakumar), married to Maya (Maya Preethi), longs for her love and affection, rooting for her to recover from a traumatic past with Rishi (Ajay Kathurvar). How these parallel stories are intertwined needs to be watched.

title: Priyamudan Priya
synopsis: Beloved radio jockey Priya's wedding plans jeopardized when an obsessed fan holds her family hostage. To protect them and her show, she faces a perilous struggle against the psycho's twisted game

title: R J Reshma
synopsis: RJ Reshma gets a strange caller on her show who says he will commit suicide if she cuts his call.

title: Raa Raa Penimiti
synopsis: The leading lady is waiting for her dearest husband to reunite.

title: Raakshasa Kaavyam
synopsis: Mythological characters Jaya-Vijaya are born as Ajay-Vijay in the outskirts of Hyderabad city. One night, Chaitanya, an engineering student, gets trapped between these two extremists and becomes a part of their criminal activities

title: Rage
synopsis: Balu investigates his friend Prudhvi's disappearance, uncovering dark secrets among their circle, leading to a confrontation with a friend harboring a grudge.

title: Rajugari Kodipulao
synopsis: A group of friends ended up hopelessly in a deep forest during their reunion trip. Were they spookily haunted by a monstrous animal with a mischievous sense of humor, or was the monster just one of them, trying to scare the rest silly?

title: Rama Banam
synopsis: Two siblings, who despite their difference in ideologies come together to fight for their common goal.

title: Ramanna Youth
synopsis: Raju wants to be a youth leader in his village but his attempt to impress the local leader backfires which leads to a challenge to meet the constituency's M.L.A. However, his impulsive decisions puts their lives in jeopardy.

title: Ramudu Anukoledhu Jaanaki Kalaganaledhu
synopsis: While sitting at a temple, Ram meets Revathi. When Ram saves Revathi's life, her parents invite him to their house. While Revathi falls for Ram, he doesn't feel the same way. What will happen next?

title: Ranga Maarthaanda
synopsis: Raghava Rao is a theatre artist who was given the title Rangamarthanda. As he grows older, he decides to retire and distributes his wealth among his children, Sri and Ranga who mistreat him and his wife Raju Garu.

title: Rangabali
synopsis: A carefree young man gets caught up in a local dispute after falling for a medical student.

title: Ratham
synopsis: An aloof editor of publication who is forced to comback to his old workplace when a friend gets murdered by a crazy fan.

title: Ravanasura
synopsis: Junior lawyer Ravindra is a goof whom no one seems to take seriously. But there's more to him beneath the surface.

title: Rebels of Thupakula Gudem
synopsis: Responding to a scheme announced by the government to end Naxalism, a group of 100 innocent unemployed youth from the village of Tupakula Gudem prepare to surrender as Naxalites. Local guy Rajanna and his aide Kumar mobilise the drive and, in a way, put the entire village in danger. In this rabid journey, what truths did Rajanna and his co uncover? And did they succeed?

title: Rent
synopsis: Three girls move into a building for rent. Some souls appear there.They girls are killed by some one. Police will start an enquiry. Vikram goes to rent the same house with family. The owner that house is dharma and has wife suma neeluhe maid of the house likes the owner neelu kills dharmas wife and his son. dharma also commits suicide and dies.The maid will own the house . knowing this, vikram kills her and takes over the house.

title: Revenge
synopsis: A drug addicted Serial killer Kali kills women without any clues. He saves the lead character Siri, who met with severe accident and admits her into hospital, surprisingly. Police also tries to pursue the killer Kali, But in vain. What's the reason for Kali's killings is the main subject of the film.

title: Revival
synopsis: REVIVAL is a dance feature film based on the rare folk dances in India. It is the narrative of a street dancer trying to explore Indian folk dances by travelling to the remote and dangerous naxalite infected areas. The film is all about the transformation of a dancer by digging into folk dances of India thereby understanding the nuances and the true essence of dance itself. The film reflects the raw and rustic lives of the real folk dancers thereby bringing the true perspective on screen through the eyes of the street dancer. Shot over a span of two years in Andhra, Telangana and Odisha, this film is an out and out dance film and whether the street dancer manages to unearth these rare folk dances, learn them and eventually perform with them in such testing conditions without food and shelter forms the crux of the film.

title: Richie Gadi Pelli
synopsis: Richie and Shree plan their dream destination wedding in Ooty after dating for two years. Amidst preparations, Richie invites his high school friends, setting the stage for celebration and reminiscence.

title: Ride to Remember
synopsis: A story of 2 bikers who set off on a ride and encounter something totally unexpected and unusual, through a person they met on their way.

title: Right
synopsis: Hero is a police officer who is heavily dependent on alcoholism to ease the pain of his family loss. Hero was a romantic and peaceful family guy, leading a good life with his family. His loving wife (heroin) and beloved daughter were murdered by his enemy right in front of his eyes, and as a result, he turns into an alcoholic. Hero supervisor Joint Commissioner requests him to proceed with a parallel investigation in a case involving the disappearance and possible kidnapping of several young married men, since the present police team is not able to make any progress in the case. Hero refuses to this. Later, his mother requests him to take up the investigation. The hero soon gets into the case files and consults the postmortem documents and the doctors who conducted it. Soon, Hero is seen making a breakthrough in the case. Another two kidnappings happen in the series, and all this leads to hero's rough conclusion of the killer. The killer is an eccentric person, has a limp in his feet, and either hates or loves women. The killer leaves certain clues inscribed by a sharp surgical knife on the chest of the victims. This serves hero thinking of what kind of person the killer is and who is his next target.

title: Roommates Part-2
synopsis: Following the events of part 1, roommates should now face the consequences for their actions.

title: Rudramambapuram
synopsis: Two rival fishermen clash on the burning issue of using ring nets. With politics adding fuel to the fire, how will the fisher folk resolve their conflict?

title: Rudramkota
synopsis: Rudra, witnesses something unusual happening to his mother, and decides to kill. How far will he go?

title: Rudrangi
synopsis: Set during the 1940s, Bheem Rao Deshmukh, a ruthless monarch and womanizer, rules Rudrangi and treats the local people there as his slaves.One day Bheem Rao comes across a woman named Rudrangi, and he falls for her beauty. Bheem Rao badly wants to have a sexual encounter with Rudrangi, and tyrannizes an entire village of Rudrangi fulfill his lust.

title: Rules Ranjann
synopsis: Mano Ranjan is a software employee who lives by a strict set of rules. His life takes an unexpected turn when he renews his friendship with Sana, a classmate from their school days.

title: Saachi
synopsis: Saachi is in high school when her father gets diagnosed with a brain tumor. Recieving no help from the family or the community, she decides to take over her family-owned barbershop business. Can she manage it all? Will her father survive?

title: O Saathiya
synopsis: The evolving love story of Arjun and Keerthi and the trials and tribulations they face as they mature from adolescence to adulthood.

title: Sagiletikatha
synopsis: While organising its annual ritual, Sagileru witnesses unexpected obstacles due to the rift between families impacting a young couple's union and a poor man's desire to eat chicken

title: Sakhi
synopsis: In "SAKHI," Tej and Priya's blissful marriage takes a tragic turn after a car accident erases Priya's memories. Tej, determined to rebuild their love, faces scrutiny from Priya's parents. This situation challenges Priya to decide between embracing the past or forging a new beginning, in a love story that defies all odds.

title: Salaar
synopsis: The fate of a violently contested kingdom hangs on the fraught bond between two friends-turned-foes in this saga of power, bloodshed and betrayal.

title: Samajavaragamana
synopsis: A lifelong university student struggling to pass his exams enlists the help of his son and his lovestruck friend. Hijinks ensue amidst blossoming love and comic bust-ups.

title: Sapta Sagaradaache Ello: Side B
synopsis: 10 years later, Manu gets released from jail and starts to build his life again. However, the memories of Priya haunt him and he is forced to enter her life again. A new life with Surabhi and memories of Priya along with it form plot.

title: Sathi Thimmamamba
synopsis: Sathi Thimmamamba is a real story happened In spite of having a son, Raja Veeraya enthrones his son-in-law Janak Venkatarayalu as the new king. When threatened by an epidemic, during 14th-15th century at Gootibayalu village

title: Seetha Balakrishna
synopsis: Seetha Balakrishna is a story about a strong resilient women who fights her battles with solidity,Story depicts brutality of existing society, evolving exponentially.

title: Shaakuntalam
synopsis: The love story of King Dushyantha and Shakuntala, daughter of sage Vishwamitra and nymph Menaka. Due to a sage's curse, Dushyant forgets all about Shakuntala, until destiny brings them together again.

title: Shaan
synopsis: Shivaji, a benevolent Zamindar's son, manages a quarry but faces tragedy when murdered by the sinister Jaggu Bhai. Sumangali, now a widow, bravely protects the quarry with her son, SHAAN. Years later, SHAAN uncovers the truth, confronts Jaggu Bhai, and ensures justice, bringing solace and happiness to Sumangali and Sunayana.

title: Sindhooram
synopsis: Ravi (Dharma Mahesh), a youngster from the village, acts as an informer. Sirisha (Brigida Saga), the new MRO to the village, hopes to bring a change. The story, set in Sriramagiri in 2003, revolves around a power struggle among Naxals/communists, local leaders and police. Ravi is close to communists and local authorities and acts as an informer. But, in this drama where all the lines are blurred, will the region ever see a change?

title: Sirijotha
synopsis: A perfect presentation which suits the correct time line where we are missing our roots and short glancing at our mother tongue. The story is all about a fight for the existence of a mother tongue by an old aged school teacher and a student who lands in India in search of his Teacher.

title: Sivaagnya
synopsis: A mid thirties atheist Sivudu is desperate to admit his daughter into the one and only school of Dharmapuri. Of all the odds, he faces challenges, being from a low caste, as the school management admits only the kids from a higher caste.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
synopsis: The prodigal son of a respected leader takes on two political rivals and forms bonds with their daughters in this Telugu-language action drama.

title: Slum Dog Husband
synopsis: An ordinary mans extraordinary struggles to get divorce from his first wife who happens to be a dog.

title: Sodara Sodarimanulara
synopsis: A struggling cab driver is falsely accused of a major crime by the police, and is forced to prove his innocence to both, a brutal police force and a divided society. A single night leaves a family of three stranded in the middle of a fight

title: Sound Party
synopsis: A father-son duo embarks on a quest for wealth, launching a family-run restaurant. But their dreams fall off when their eatery is shut due to illegalities, leading to a series of events, yielding control of their lives to a local criminal.

title: Spark: L.I.F.E.
synopsis: Jay's love for Ananya leads to a deadly chain of events while Lekha's dreams collide with a stranger named Arya. As suicide killings grip the nation, a sinister force entwines their lives. Is Arya a friend or a foe?

title: Spy
synopsis: After receiving the news of the death of his elder brother Subash, who worked for R&AW, Jay sets out on a mission to find out what happened leading him into a bigger conspiracy of a possible nuclear attack threat to the country.

title: Sri Krishna Devaraya
synopsis: This Story Sri Krishnadevaraya movie revolves around The Kings starting from Harihararaya and Bukkaraya and SaluvaNarasimhadevaraya and paticularly Sri Krishnadevaraya who ruled from 1509 A.D. to 1529 A.D. who was a Thulava dynasty ruler .

title: Sridevi Shoban Babu
synopsis: Sridevi is a young fashion designer from Hyderabad. Shoban Babu is a big-hearted guy from Anakapalli. Both of them meet in Araku valley and fight over a property. What happens subsequently forms the story.

title: Stopwatch
synopsis: A businessman Jay's wife mysteriously goes missing. Based on the evidence found by the Forensic Department, their lawyer Yogi suspects Jay and interrogates him to untangle the truth. Who is the real culprit?

title: The Story of a Beautiful Girl
synopsis: Lovable girl with big dreams vanishes, triggering media frenzy and investigation. What happened to her? Mystery unfolds as search for answers begins. After her disappearance, the girl's loved ones and the public are left to wonder.

title: The Suicide Note
synopsis: After a painful rejection from a girl, Hemanth decides to commit suicide after writing a suicide note

title: Suit

synopsis: Introducing WAH - a short film dedicated to raising awareness about website address hacking and cyber security. Inspired by true events and filled with messages of cyber security and thoughtfulness, WAH - Website Address Hacker is all about a person who is watching a movie, gets a message on his mobile about the latest offers. He logs into the website and buys a shirt from using his credit card. Goes back to the movie. After One hour he gets a message that 10000 rupees was debited from his card. He calls the customer care to check, if the information is valid. The customer service agent states that 2 transactions were made on the card and yes 10000 was debited. The person goes bizarre. Could not think of anyway out and realizes that he was trapped. Because he overthought he goes to sleep. Since he was watching "INCEPTION - DREAM WITHIN A DREAM". He goes into the dream and wakes up in the dream not the next day by previous day. He watches what he did the next day till the time had arrived for him to buy the shirt. He checks the website address being non-legitimate one, after entering the card details and saving them on the website, the hacker was able to easily hack the card details and hacked 10000 rupees. The person comes out of the dream in a flash and realizes that non-legitimate website was the prime reason, and remembers that he has to delete the card details and does it immediately. CYBER CRIME CAN HAPPEN AT ANYTIME ANYWHERE, NEVER SAVE ANY OF THE CARD DETAILS ON ANY OF THE WEBSITES. TIME FOR YOU GO BACK TO THE WEBSITES AND DELETE ALL THE CARD DETAILS.

Protagonist Priya's journey is inherently universal-a timeless quest for identity, purpose, and the courage to embrace one's authentic self. title: Itlu Mee Cinema
synopsis: In "Itlu mee cinema," we follow the journey of Ram (Abhiram), a talented software engineer with a burning passion for filmmaking. Driven by his love for movies, Ram takes a bold leap, leaving behind his stable job to pursue his dream of becoming a director. Alongside him are three close friends: Pawan, Manohar, and Krishna, each with their own aspirations within the film industry. Despite their relentless efforts, the four friends face numerous challenges in their quest for opportunities in the competitive world of cinema. Rejected time and again by established studios, they decide to take matters into their own hands and opt for crowdfunding to finance their debut film. Meanwhile, amidst the trials of filmmaking, Ram's personal life takes a turn as his girlfriend Janu (Vennela) proposes marriage, urging him to reconsider his priorities. Struggling to balance his passion for filmmaking and his relationship, Ram finds himself at a crossroads, torn between love and ambition. As production begins on their independent film, the friends encounter a rollercoaster of setbacks and small victories. They navigate creative differences, financial constraints, and unexpected hurdles, testing their friendship and resolve. Through it all, they learn invaluable lessons about perseverance, collaboration, and the true meaning of chasing one's dreams. The climax culminates on the premiere night of their film. Amidst a mix of anticipation and nervousness, they await the audience's verdict-a moment that will define their journey in the film industry. Will their passion project be embraced by audiences and critics alike, propelling them into stardom? Or will it mark the end of their aspirations, forcing them to reassess their futures? In a heartfelt conclusion, the film not only explores the intricacies of the filmmaking process but also delves into the personal sacrifices and triumphs of its characters. As the credits roll, viewers are left pondering the unpredictable path to success and the enduring power of dreams. Epilogue: The fate of Ram and Janu's love story and the ultimate success of their film remain open-ended, leaving audiences to imagine the characters' futures beyond the screen. "Pursuit of Dreams" is a testament to the indomitable spirit of aspiring filmmakers everywhere, reminding us that every dream is worth pursuing, no matter the obstacles along the way.

synopsis: Pushpa is become the head of red sandal smuggling syndicate and rules the whole state .While Bhawar Singh Shekhawat is waiting for revenge on Pushpa for insulting him. Bharti is a good friend of Chantibanti and protects them in every way. Chanti and Bunty pull out a lorry that has fallen down in the forest with their strength and come to Hyderabad for that money and join the work in the timber depot. title: Simhadwani
synopsis: In the heart of a city plagued by the scourge of narcotics, Bhargav Ram, a man once immersed in the warmth of family and friendship, finds himself engulfed by the shadows of loss and despair. The tendrils of addiction have ensnared the youth, turning them into perpetrators of heinous crimes, shattering lives and tearing apart the fabric of society. Having suffered the devastating consequences firsthand, Bhargav Ram emerges from the ashes of his own tragedy with a resolve as unyielding as steel. Determined to stem the tide of destruction, he embarks on a solitary crusade to reclaim the souls lost to the clutches of addiction. Armed not with weapons, but with unwavering conviction and an indomitable spirit, Bhargav Ram becomes a beacon of hope in a city drowning in despair. He delves into the heart of darkness, confronting the kingpins of the narcotics trade and dismantling their empires brick by brick. Yet, his journey is fraught with peril, as he navigates through a labyrinth of deceit and betrayal. He faces adversaries who stop at nothing to protect their illicit interests, confronting him with challenges that seem insurmountable. But Bhargav Ram is undeterred, drawing strength from the memories of those he has lost and the vision of a brighter future for the youth ensnared by addiction. With every step he takes, he inspires others to join him in his quest for redemption, forging alliances with unlikely allies and kindling the flames of revolution in the hearts of the downtrodden. Through acts of courage and sacrifice, Bhargav Ram emerges as a true hero, a symbol of resilience and defiance in the face of adversity. His unwavering determination and unshakable integrity pave the way for a new dawn, where the shadows of narcotics and illegal activities are banished, and the youth find hope and purpose once more. In the end, Bhargav Ram's journey is not just a battle against the forces of evil, but a testament to the power of the human spirit to overcome even the darkest of nights and emerge into the light of a new day.
